title: All to know about Canadian wildfire smoke, air quality and World Cup final
english: Concerns have emerged regarding the impact of Canadian wildfire smoke and severe thunderstorms on the upcoming World Cup final in New Jersey. Recent air quality levels in the region dropped significantly, but experts anticipate conditions will improve to a moderate level by the time the match begins. FIFA is currently working with local officials to monitor the situation and ensure the event proceeds safely.
amharic: በኒው ጀርሲ በሚካሄደው የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ ላይ የካናዳ የደን ቃጠሎ ጭስ እና መጥፎ የአየር ሁኔታ ተጽዕኖ ሊያሳድሩ እንደሚችሉ ስጋት ተፈጥሯል። በክልሉ የአየር ጥራት በእጅጉ ቀንሶ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ በጨዋታው ቀን ሁኔታው ወደ ተሻለ ደረጃ እንደሚደርስ ባለሙያዎች ይገምታሉ። ፊፋ ከሀገር ውስጥ ባለስልጣናት ጋር በመሆን የአየር ሁኔታውን በቅርበት እየተከታተለ ይገኛል።
oromo: Qulqullinni qilleensa naannoo Niiw Jarsii aara ibidda bosonaa Kaanaadaa irraa dhufteen miidhamee ture, kunis xumura tapha Waancaa Addunyaa irratti dhiibbaa uumuu danda'a jedhamee sodaatamaa jira. Haata'u malee, ogeeyyonni yeroo taphichi jalqabu qilleensichi gara sadarkaa gaariitti deebi'a jedhanii tilmaamu. FIFA'n haala qilleensa naannichaa hordofaa jiru yoo ta'u, qophii taphichaa tasgabbeessuuf aangoota naannoo wajjin waliin hojjetaa jira.

title: Thousands rally in London in support of Gaza, demand new PM take action
english: Thousands of protesters gathered in London to urge the incoming British Prime Minister, Andy Burnham, to stop supplying weapons to Israel and take a stronger stance against the war in Gaza. Demonstrators argued that the previous administration failed to adequately address the ongoing humanitarian crisis and urged the new government to end the UK's involvement in the conflict. The rally, which included prominent figures like Jeremy Corbyn, highlighted growing public pressure on the new leadership to prioritize accountability for the thousands of lives lost.
amharic: በለንደን በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰልፈኞች አዲሱ የብሪታኒያ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አንዲ በርንሃም ለእስራኤል የጦር መሳሪያ መላክን እንዲያቆሙ እና በጋዛ ላይ ለሚካሄደው ጦርነት ጠንካራ አቋም እንዲወስዱ ጠይቀዋል። ተቃዋሚዎቹ የቀድሞው መንግስት ሰብአዊ ቀውሱን ለመፍታት በቂ ጥረት አላደረገም በማለት አዲሱ አመራር ብሪታኒያ በግጭቱ ያላትን ተሳትፎ እንዲያቆም አሳስበዋል። በጄረሚ ኮርቢን መሪነት የተካሄደው ይህ ሰልፍ፣ አዲሱ መንግስት ለተጎጂዎች ተጠያቂነትን በማስፈን ረገድ ትኩረት እንዲሰጥ ግፊት ለማድረግ ያለመ ነው።
oromo: London keessatti namoonni kumaatamaan lakkaawwaman hiriira ba’uun, muummichi ministeeraa biyyattii haaraa Andy Burnham, Israa’eliif meeshaalee waraanaa dhiyeessuu akka dhaabu fi waraana Gaazaarratti tarkaanfii cimaa akka fudhatu gaafataniiru. Hiriirtonni mootummaan duraa rakkoo namoomaa jiru furuuf gahaa kan hin taane ta’uu ibsuun, mootummaan haaraan kun hirmaannaa Britaan waraana kana keessatti qabdu akka dhaabu dhaamaniiru. Hiriirri kun, kan hogganoota beekamoo akka Jeremy Corbyn hirmaachise, dhiibbaa uummataa inni guddachaa jiru mootummaan haaraan sun itti gaafatamummaa akka fudhatu kan gaafatuudha.

title: Lebanese soldier killed as army vehicle hits explosive in south Lebanon
english: A Lebanese soldier died and two others were injured after their military vehicle struck an explosive device in the town of Mansouri. The Lebanese army confirmed the incident, while the Israeli military stated that the vehicle had entered a restricted security zone. An investigation is currently underway regarding the circumstances of the blast.
amharic: በደቡብ ሊባኖስ አል-ማንሱሪ ከተማ የሊባኖስ ጦር ተሽከርካሪ ፈንጂ በመርገጡ አንድ ወታደር ሲሞት ሁለት ሌሎች የጦር አባላት ቆስለዋል። የሊባኖስ ጦር ድርጊቱን ያረጋገጠ ሲሆን፣ የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ በበኩሉ ተሽከርካሪው ወደተከለከለ የጸጥታ ቀጠና በመግባቱ እንደተመታ አስታውቋል። በጉዳዩ ላይ ተጨማሪ ምርመራዎች እየተደረጉ ነው።
oromo: Magaalaa Mansuurii kan kibba Libaanoositti konkolaataan waraanaa Libaanoos tokko dhukaatuu irra buutee lubbuun waraanaa tokko yoo darbu, warri biroo lama immoo miidhamaniiru. Waraanni Libaanoos dhuga kana kan mirkaneesse yoo ta'u, waraanni Israa'el ammoo konkolaatichi iddoo eegumsa cimaa jiru keessa seenuufii akka ture ibseera. Iddoo kanaa fi haala inni itti uumame irratti qorannoon gaggeeffamaa jira.

title: UKMTO says vessel seized in Gulf of Aden now in Somali waters
english: A ship that was captured near the coast of Yemen yesterday has been moved into the territorial waters of Somalia. Maritime authorities have officially confirmed the incident as a hijacking. Officials are currently monitoring the situation after the vessel was taken by force.
amharic: ትናንት በየመን የባህር ዳርቻ አቅራቢያ ተይዞ የነበረው መርከብ በአሁኑ ወቅት ወደ ሶማሊያ ግዛት የባህር ክልል መግባቱ ተረጋግጧል። የባህር ላይ ደህንነት ባለስልጣናት ይህንን ድርጊት በይፋ እንደጠለፋ መፈረጃቸውን አስታውቀዋል። መርከቡ በኃይል ከተያዘ በኋላ ባለስልጣናት ሁኔታውን በቅርበት እየተከታተሉት ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Dooniin kalee qarqara galaana Yaman biratti qabame ture, amma gara daangaa bishaan Somaaliyaa geessameera. Aangeyyoonni galaanaas gochi kun karaa seeraan alaa butamuu isaa mirkaneessaniiru. Doonichi humnaan erga fudhatamee booda, qaamoleen dhimmi ilaallatu haala jiru hordofaa jiru.

title: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
english: Two American soldiers were killed and another is missing following Iranian drone and missile strikes in Jordan. This incident occurred as the US military continues a series of retaliatory attacks against Iran after a brief ceasefire failed. Several other US personnel were injured in the assault, and tensions continue to escalate as the regional conflict persists.
amharic: በዮርዳኖስ በተፈጸመ የኢራን ድሮን እና ሚሳይል ጥቃት ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ሲገደሉ አንድ ወታደር ደግሞ የደረሰበት አልታወቀም። ይህ ጥቃት የተፈጸመው የአሜሪካ እና የኢራን የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት በመፍረሱ አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ጥቃት እየሰነዘረች ባለችበት ወቅት ነው። በዚሁ ጥቃት ሌሎች የአሜሪካ ወታደሮችም ጉዳት የደረሰባቸው ሲሆን፣ በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ያለው ግጭት ተባብሶ ቀጥሏል።
oromo: Jordaanitti haleellaa xiyyaara malee fi misayilii Iraan geggeessiteen waraana Ameerikaa lama yoo du'an, tokko immoo iddoon buuteen isaa dhabameera. Haleellaan kun kan raawwatame yeroo Ameerikaan fi Iraan walii galtee waraana dhaabuu diiganii, Ameerikaan Iraan irratti haleellaa deebitee geggeessaa jirtutti. Haleellaa kanaan waraanotni Ameerikaa biroo midhamaniiru; walitti bu'iinsi biyyoota lamaanii fi naannichaa caalaatti hammaachaa dhufeera.

title: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
english: Hungarian President Tamás Sulyok has agreed to resign after the new government, led by the Tisza party, passed legislation to remove him. This move is part of broader constitutional changes aimed at purging officials associated with the former administration of Viktor Orbán. The government also mandated the removal of the Constitutional Court head and implemented strict age and term limits for judicial and parliamentary members.
amharic: የሃንጋሪው ፕሬዝዳንት ታማስ ሱልዮክ፣ በአዲሱ መንግስት እና በቲዛ ፓርቲ አባላት ግፊት ከስልጣን ለመልቀቅ ተስማምተዋል። ይህ እርምጃ በቀድሞው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቪክቶር ኦርባን አስተዳደር ተፅዕኖ ስር የነበሩ ባለስልጣናትን ከስልጣን ለማስወገድ ከተደረጉ የህገ-መንግስት ማሻሻያዎች አንዱ ነው። በተጨማሪም አዲሱ አስተዳደር የህገ-መንግስት ፍርድ ቤት ኃላፊን ጨምሮ ሌሎች ከፍተኛ ባለስልጣናትን በዕድሜ እና በስልጣን ዘመን ገደብ መሰረት ከስልጣን አባሯል።
oromo: Pirezedantiin Hangaarii Taamaas Sulyook, mootummaan haarayni paartii Tiizaan hoogganamu aangoo irraa akka isa buusu erga murteesseen booda, fedhii isaatiin gadi lakkisee ba'uuf walii galeera. Tarkaanfiin kun jijjiirama heera mootummaa kan duraanii kan ministira muummee kanaan duraa Viiktor Orbaan wajjin wal qabatu akka dhaabbatu godhu dha. Mootummaan kun hooggantoota mana maree heeraa fi abbootii seeraa umuriin isaanii fi yeroon aangoo isaanii daangaa darbetti akka aangoo gadi lakkisanis dirqisiiseera.

title: German politician resigns over surrogacy child controversy
english: German politician Jens Spahn has resigned from his leadership role after facing backlash for using a surrogate mother to have a child. Because surrogacy is illegal in Germany and Spahn had previously supported these restrictive laws, critics accused him of hypocrisy. He ultimately decided to step down, stating that his family life and his political responsibilities were no longer compatible.
amharic: የጀርመን ፖለቲከኛ የሆኑት የንስ ስፓን በውጭ አገር የኪራይ ማህፀን በመጠቀም ልጅ በመውለዳቸው በተነሳባቸው ትችት ከፓርላማ ቡድን መሪነታቸው መልቀቃቸውን አስታውቀዋል። በጀርመን የኪራይ ማህፀን ህገወጥ በመሆኑ እና ስፓን ቀደም ሲል ይህንን ህግ ይደግፉ ስለነበር፣ ድርጊታቸው አድርባይነት ነው በሚል ሲተቹ ቆይተዋል። በመጨረሻም የቤተሰብ ህይወታቸው እና የፖለቲካ ስልጣናቸው አብረው ሊሄዱ አልቻሉም በሚል ከኃላፊነታቸው ለቀዋል።
oromo: Polaatikoon Jarman Jens Spaan, biyya alaa deemuun haadha buusaa (surrogacy) fayyadamuun mucaa waan godhatanif mormiin guddaan isaanirra gahee, hoggansa isaanii gadhiisuuf dirqamaniiru. Jarman keessatti haadha buusaa fayyadamuun seeraan alaa fi Spaan dursee seera kana kan deeggaran waan ta'aniif, gochi kun fakkeessummaa dha jechuun mormiituun isaan qeequ turan. Xumura irratti jireenyi maatii isaanii fi hojiin siyaasaa isaanii wal-faayidaa akka hin taane hubachuun, aangoo isaanii gadhiisuuf murteessaniiru.

title: Iran supreme leader warns of ‘unforgettable lessons’ if US attacks continue
english: Iran's Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, has accused the United States of breaking recent agreements and condemned the latest American strikes on Iranian civilian infrastructure. He declared that President Trump's commitments are unreliable and warned that Iran and its allies are prepared to deliver severe consequences if the aggression continues. As the ongoing conflict escalates, Iran remains defiant while calling on its citizens to stay alert and trust the government's defense strategies.
amharic: የኢራን ጠቅላይ መሪ ሞጅታባ ካሜኔይ፣ አሜሪካ በቅርቡ የተደረሱ ስምምነቶችን እንደጣሰች በመግለጽ በኢራን ሲቪል መሰረተ ልማቶች ላይ ያደረሰችውን ጥቃት አውግዘዋል። የፕሬዚዳንት ትራምፕ ፊርማ ምንም ዋጋ እንደሌለው የተናገሩት መሪው፣ ጥቃቱ የሚቀጥል ከሆነ ኢራን እና አጋሮቿ ለአሜሪካ የማይረሱ ትምህርቶችን እንደሚሰጡ አስጠንቅቀዋል። ግጭቱ እየተባባሰ በሄደበት በዚህ ወቅት፣ ኢራን አቋሟን እንደማትቀይር ገልጻ፣ ህዝቧም በትኩረት እንዲከታተልና በመንግስት ላይ እምነት እንዲጥል ጥሪ አቅርባለች።
oromo: Hoggantoonni olaanoon Iraan, Mojtaba Khamenei, Ameerikaan walii galtee kanaan dura irra gahame cabsuushee fi bu'uuraalee misoomaa Iraan irratti haleellaa raawwachuushee balaaleffataniiru. Akka hogganaan kun jedhanitti, mallattoon Pirezidaant Traamp kan amanamu miti; haleellaan kun yoo itti fufe, Iraanii fi kutaaleen ishee ishee deggeran Ameerikaaf barnoota hin dagatamne akka kennan akeekkachiisaniiru. Waraanni kun hammaachaa waan jiruuf, Iraan harka hin kennattu jedhanii, lammiileen ishees eeggannoo akka taasisanii fi mootummaa isaanii akka amanan gaafataniiru.

title: Israeli attacks on residential areas in Gaza kill eight
english: Israeli military forces launched airstrikes and artillery attacks on residential neighborhoods in Gaza City, resulting in the deaths of at least eight people. These strikes occurred in areas that extend well beyond the zones designated for Israeli troops under the existing ceasefire agreement. Rescue operations are currently underway as authorities warn that the casualty count may increase due to the destruction of civilian housing.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች በጋዛ ከተማ በሚገኙ የመኖሪያ አካባቢዎች ላይ ባደረሱት የአየር እና የጦር መሳሪያ ድብደባ ቢያንስ ስምንት ሰዎች መሞታቸው ተዘግቧል። ጥቃቶቹ የተፈጸሙት ከነባሩ የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት ውጪ በሆኑ አካባቢዎች ነው። በደረሰው ከፍተኛ ውድመት ሳቢያ የነፍስ አድን ስራዎች እየተከናወኑ ሲሆን፣ የሟቾች ቁጥር ሊጨምር እንደሚችልም ተሰግቷል።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Israa'el naannolee mana jireenyaa magaalaa Gaazaa keessatti haleellaa qilleensaafi kan madafaa gaggeessaniin namoonni yoo xiqqaate saddeet du'aniiru. Haleellaan kun kan raawwatame bakka waldhabdee dhaabuurratti waliigallee ture sanaan alattiidha. Haleellaa kana hordofee miidhaa qaqqabeen namoonni hedduun jala dhokachuu danda'u waan ta'eef, hojiin barbaachaafi fayyisuu itti fufee jira.

title: New York’s Mamdani says looking into Netanyahu arrest during city visit
english: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is currently consulting with legal experts to determine if he has the authority to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Mamdani, who previously campaigned on this promise, believes Netanyahu should face justice due to the international arrest warrant issued for alleged war crimes in Gaza. While Israeli officials intend for Netanyahu to attend the upcoming UN General Assembly in New York, the mayor is exploring what legal actions are possible within his jurisdiction.
amharic: የኒውዮርክ ከተማ ከንቲባ ዞራን ማምዳኒ፣ እስራኤላዊው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንጃሚን ኔታንያሁ በኒውዮርክ ጉብኝት ሲያደርጉ የማሰር ስልጣን እንዳላቸው ከህግ ባለሙያዎች ጋር እየመከሩ ነው። ማምዳኒ በጋዛ በፈጸሙት ተብሎ በሚጠረጠር የጦር ወንጀል አለም አቀፍ የወንጀል ፍርድ ቤት የእስር ትእዛዝ የተላለፈባቸው ኔታንያሁ ለፍርድ መቅረብ አለባቸው የሚል አቋም አላቸው። የእስራኤል ባለስልጣናት ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትሩ በሚቀጥለው ወር በኒውዮርክ በተባበሩት መንግስታት ጠቅላላ ጉባኤ ላይ እንደሚገኙ ቢገልጹም፣ ከንቲባው በከተማው ህግ መሰረት ሊወስዱ የሚችሉትን እርምጃ እየገመገሙ ነው።
oromo: Kantiibaan magaalaa Niiw Yoork Zoraan Maamdaanii, muummee ministira Israa’eel Benjaamiin Netanyaahu yoo gara magaalaattii dhufan hidhuuf aangoo qabaachuu fi dhabuu isaanii ogeeyyota seeraa waliin mari’achaa jiru. Maamdaanii, Netanyaahu yakka waraanaa Gaazaa keessatti raawwataniin himatamuun isaanii fi seeraan gaafatamu akka qaban amanu. Mootummaan Israa’eel Netanyaahu guyyaa gamaa walgahii Gamtaa Mootummootaa irratti Niiw Yoork akka argaman ibsanus, kantiibichi seera biyyattii hordofuun tarkaanfii fudhatamuu danda’u qorachaa jiru.

title: Damage visible at Iran bridges and water plant after US attacks
english: Recent US military strikes against Iran have caused significant damage to critical infrastructure, including bridges and a water desalination plant. These attacks, which have occurred for seven consecutive nights, have disrupted water supplies to various southern villages. In retaliation, Iran has launched missiles at US allies in the Gulf, causing power shortages in regions like Kuwait.
amharic: በኢራን ላይ የተካሄደው የአሜሪካ የአየር ጥቃት በድልድዮች እና በውኃ ማጣሪያ ተቋማት ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት አድርሷል። ለሰባት ቀናት በተከታታይ የቀጠለው ይህ ጥቃት በደቡባዊ የኢራን መንደሮች የውኃ አቅርቦት እንዲቋረጥ ምክንያት ሆኗል። ኢራንም ለዚህ ምላሽ በባህረ ሰላጤው አገራት በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ አጋሮች ላይ የሚሳይል ጥቃት የከፈተች ሲሆን ይህም በኩዌት የኃይል አቅርቦት መስተጓጎል አስከትሏል።
oromo: Humni waraana Amerikaa gara Iranitti haleellaa raawwateen bu'uuraalee misoomaa kanneen akka daldalawwanii fi dhaabbata bishaan qulqulleessu irratti miidhaan guddaan gahee jira. Haleellaan guyyoota torba walitti aansuun itti fufe kun, gandoota kibba Iranitti bishaan akka dhabamu taasiseera. Iranis deebii kanaan biyyoota Galdicha keessa jiran kan Amerikaan deggertu irratti misaa'ela dhukaasuun, Kuweyt keessatti hanqina anniisaa uumee jira.

title: US military says two service members killed in Iranian strike in Jordan
english: Two American soldiers were killed and another remains missing following a missile and drone attack launched by Iran against targets in Jordan. Four other service members were hospitalized but have since been released, while several others received treatment for minor injuries. This violent escalation follows the collapse of a ceasefire agreement, raising serious international concerns about a potential return to full-scale regional conflict.
amharic: ኢራን በዮርዳኖስ በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ዒላማዎች ላይ በፈጸመችው የሚሳኤል እና የድሮን ጥቃት ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መገደላቸውንና አንድ ወታደር መጥፋቱን የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ምንጮች አረጋግጠዋል። ሌሎች አራት ወታደሮች ለህክምና ወደ ሆስፒታል የተወሰዱ ሲሆን አሁን ላይ ከህክምና መውጣታቸው ታውቋል። ይህ ጥቃት የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነቱ መፍረሱን ተከትሎ የተከሰተ ሲሆን፣ በክልሉ አጠቃላይ ጦርነት ሊቀሰቀስ ይችላል የሚል ስጋት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Iraaniin boombii fi xiyyaara nama hin feene (drones) fayyadamtee buufata waraana Ameerikaa kan Yordaanos keessa jiru irratti haleellaa raawwatteeniin waraanni Ameerikaa lama du'anii tokko immoo bakka buutee kan hin beekne ta'uun ibsameera. Waraanni afur miidhaan erga irra ga'ee booda yaalamanii kan gadi lakkifaman yoo ta'u, warri kaan immoo miidhaa xiqqoo irra ga'ee ture qoratamaniiru. Haleellaan kun waliigaltee nagaa cabuu hordofee kan dhufe ta'uun isaa, waraanni guutuu naannichaa akka hin kaasne sodaa guddaa uumeera.

title: UKMTO reports tanker incident involving military forces east of Oman's Duqm
english: The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations has reported a maritime incident involving a tanker and military personnel near Oman. The event took place approximately 100 nautical miles east of the port of Duqm. Officials stated that the interaction appears to be linked to broader military operations currently taking place in the area.
amharic: የዩናይትድ ኪንግደም የባህር ንግድ ኦፕሬሽንስ (UKMTO) በኦማን የባህር ዳርቻ አቅራቢያ በአንድ የነዳጅ መጫኛ መርከብ እና በወታደራዊ ኃይሎች መካከል ግጭት ወይም ግንኙነት መፈጠሩን አስታውቋል። ክስተቱ የተከናወነው ከዱቅም ወደብ በስተምስራቅ 100 የባህር ማይል ርቀት ላይ ነው። ባለሥልጣናቱ እንደገለጹት ይህ ድርጊት በአካባቢው እየተካሄደ ካለው ወታደራዊ እንቅስቃሴ ጋር የተያያዘ ነው።
oromo: Hojiiwwan Daldala Galaana UK (UKMTO) jedhaman akka gabaasanitti, markabni boba'aa fe'u tokko fi humnoonni waraanaa galaana Omaan biratti walitti dhufeenya uumaniiru. Rakkoon kun kan uumame magaalaa Duqmi irraa gara bahaatti fageenya maayila galaana 100 irratti. Qondaaltoonni akka jedhanitti, walitti bu'iinsi kun sochii waraanaa naannichatti adeemaa jiru waliin wal qabata.

title: World Cup 2026: Palestinian flags become a target at US-based games
english: Spectators attending World Cup matches in the United States report that security officials are frequently targeting and confiscating Palestinian flags. Although FIFA's official rules permit national flags inside stadiums, fans say they are being forced to put them away upon entry. This has sparked controversy as the flags appear in support of Palestine, even though the national team is not participating in the current tournament.
amharic: በአሜሪካ በሚካሄዱ የዓለም ዋንጫ ጨዋታዎች ላይ የፍልስጤም ሰንደቅ ዓላማ በፀጥታ ኃይሎች እየተነጠቀ መሆኑ ተነግሯል። ምንም እንኳን የፊፋ ህግ አገራዊ ባንዲራዎችን ወደ ስታዲየም ማስገባት የሚፈቅድ ቢሆንም፣ ደጋፊዎች በገቡበት ወቅት ባንዲራዎቹን እንዲያስረክቡ እየተገደዱ ነው። ፍልስጤም በውድድሩ ባትሳተፍም፣ ደጋፊዎች የአጋርነት ስሜታቸውን ለመግለጽ ባንዲራዎቹን መጠቀማቸው ውዝግብ አስነስቷል።
oromo: Taphoota Waancaa Addunyaa kan Yuunaayitid Isteetsitti gaggeeffamaa jiran irratti, alaabaan Filisxeem jiran jabeessuudhaan qabamanii irraa fudhatamaa jiraachuun himameera. Seerri FIFA alaabaa biyyoolessaa gara istaadiyamii galchuun kan hayyamame ta'us, qondaaltoonni nageenyaa namoota alaabaa kana qabatanii dhufan dirqisiisuun alaabaa isaanii irraa hiikaa jiru. Filisxeem dorgommicha irratti kan hin hirmaanne ta'us, gochi kun deggertoonni tokkummaa isaanii agarsiisuuf alaabaa fayyadamuu isaaniitiin kan wal qabate dha.

title: France vs England LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 third-place playoff
english: France and England are set to face off in the third-place playoff of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Despite being pre-tournament favorites, both teams now compete for the bronze medal. The game is scheduled to take place at Miami Stadium in Florida starting at 5:00 PM local time.
amharic: የፈረንሳይ እና የእንግሊዝ ብሔራዊ ቡድኖች የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ የሦስተኛ ደረጃን ለመያዝ ይፋለማሉ። ምንም እንኳን ሁለቱ ቡድኖች የውድድሩ ዋንጫ ባለቤት እንደሚሆኑ ቢጠበቅም፣ አሁን ግን የነሐስ ሜዳሊያውን ለማግኘት ይጫወታሉ። ጨዋታው በዩናይትድ ስቴትስ ፍሎሪዳ በሚገኘው ማያሚ ስታዲየም ከቀኑ 11 ሰዓት ላይ ይካሄዳል።
oromo: Faransaayifi Ingiliiz tapha xumuraa goolabbiif qophaa'an keessatti sadarkaa sadaffaaf wal dorgomuuf jiru. Gareewwan kunneen duraan waancaa fudhatu jedhamee eegamaa turus, amma meedaaliyaa nahaasaa fudhachuuf wal dorgomu. Taphichi magaalaa Maayami, Istateeytii Filooridaa keessatti galgala sa'aatii shan irratti kan geggeeffamu ta'a.

title: Lebanon’s Aoun to meet Trump in Washington to discuss Israel talks
english: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun is traveling to Washington to meet with President Donald Trump to advance efforts toward a ceasefire and the withdrawal of Israeli forces from southern Lebanon. The discussions will center on restoring stability and expanding the authority of the Lebanese state across its territory. While recent talks have focused on creating withdrawal zones, the process remains complicated by ongoing clashes and disagreements regarding the disarmament of Hezbollah.
amharic: የሊባኖሱ ፕሬዝዳንት ጆሴፍ አውን በእስራኤል እና በሂዝቦላህ መካከል የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነትን ለማጠናከር እና የእስራኤል ጦር ከደቡብ ሊባኖስ ለቆ እንዲወጣ ለመወያየት ወደ ዋሽንግተን አምርተዋል። ፕሬዝዳንቱ ከዶናልድ ትራምፕ ጋር በሚያደርጉት ውይይት፣ የሊባኖስን መንግሥት ስልጣን በሀገሪቱ ሙሉ ክልል ላይ ለማስከበር እና ሰላምን ለመመለስ ይመክራሉ። ምንም እንኳን የአሜሪካ ሽምግልና ቢኖርም፣ እስካሁን ድረስ በሁለቱ ወገኖች መካከል የሚደረጉ ጥቃቶች እና የሂዝቦላህ ትጥቅ መፍታት ጉዳይ የሰላም ሂደቱን ፈታኝ አድርገውታል።
oromo: Pireezidaantiin Libaanoos Jooseef Aawun, marii waraana dhaabuu fi waraanni Israa'eel kibba Libaanoos gadhiisee akka ba'u dhimmoota jiran irratti Pireezidaant Doonaald Traamp waliin mari'achuuf gara Waashingitanitti imalaniiru. Mariin kun nagaa mirkaneessuu fi aangoon mootummaa Libaanoos guutummaa biyyattii irratti akka cimu irratti kan xiyyeeffatu ta'a. Giddu-galeessummaan Ameerikaa jiraatus, walitti bu'iinsi ammas itti fufuu fi dhimmi hidhannoo hiikkachuu Hizbullaah adeemsa nagaa kana rakkisaa taasiseera.

title: UK’s Josh Kerr smashes longstanding world mile record in London
english: British athlete Josh Kerr set a new world record in the mile at the London Diamond League by clocking in at 3 minutes and 42.66 seconds. This impressive performance surpassed the previous record held by Moroccan runner Hicham El Guerrouj for 27 years. Kerr, who prepared for the race through his dedicated 'Project 222' training regimen, expressed his excitement after achieving this historic milestone in front of a home crowd.
amharic: የብሪታኒያው አትሌት ጆሽ ኬር በለንደን ዳይመንድ ሊግ የአንድ ማይል ሩጫን በ3 ደቂቃ ከ42.66 ሰከንድ በማጠናቀቅ አዲስ የዓለም ክብረ ወሰን አስመዘገበ። ይህ አስደናቂ ብቃት ሞሮኳዊው ሂሻም ኤል ጉሩጅ ለ27 ዓመታት ይዘውት የነበረውን ክብረ ወሰን ያሻረ ነው። በ'ፕሮጀክት 222' ልዩ ስልጠና ሲዘጋጅ የቆየው ኬር፣ በሀገሩ ደጋፊዎች ፊት ይህንን ታሪካዊ ውጤት በማግኘቱ ከፍተኛ ደስታውን ገልጿል።
oromo: Atileetiin biyya Ingiliz Josh Kerr, agarsiisa dinqisiisaa London Diamond League irratti agarsiisee fiigicha mayila tokko daqiiqaa 3 fi sekondii 42.66 xumuruun rekoodii addunyaa haaraa galmeesseera. Raawwiin kun, fiigicha weerarri Morookoo Hicham El Guerrouj waggoota 27f qabatee ture kan cabse dha. Leenjii 'Project 222' jedhamuun qophaa'aa kan ture Kerr, injifannoo seenaa qabeessa kana saba isaatiin marfamee galmeessuu isaatitti gammachuu guddaa ibseera.

title: World Cup 2026: Palestinian flags become a target at US-based games
english: During the 2026 World Cup in the United States, fans have reported that security guards are repeatedly stopping them from displaying Palestinian flags inside stadiums. Although FIFA rules allow national flags, activists argue that inconsistent messaging from the organization has emboldened security to confiscate these items from supporters. Many see this trend as an unfair targeting of Palestinian identity, leading to confrontations at various tournament venues as the final matches approach.
amharic: በአሜሪካ እየተካሄደ በሚገኘው የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ፣ ደጋፊዎች በስታዲየም ውስጥ የፍልስጤም ሰንደቅ ዓላማ እንዳይይዙ በጸጥታ ኃይሎች እየተከለከሉ መሆኑን ገልጸዋል። የፊፋ ህግ አገራዊ ባንዲራዎችን መያዝ የሚፈቅድ ቢሆንም፣ የድርጅቱ ግልጽ ያልሆነ አሰራር ደጋፊዎች ባንዲራቸውን እንዳይይዙ እንዲደረግ ምክንያት ሆኗል በማለት አክቲቪስቶች ይወቅሳሉ። ይህ ድርጊት የፍልስጤም ማንነትን ዒላማ ያደረገ አድሎአዊ ድርጊት ነው የሚል ቅሬታ አስነስቷል።
oromo: Waliigaltee fi taphoota Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2026 biyya Ameerikaatti gaggeeffamaa jiru irratti, taphattoonni fi deggertoonni alaabaa Filisxeem qabatanii argamuun isaanii humnoota eegumsaatiin akka dhorkamaa jiru himameera. Seerri FIFA alaabaa biyyootaa qabachuu kan heyyamu ta'us, qajeelfamni ifa hin taane kun eegduun istaadiyamii akka namoota dararan godheera jechuun aktivistonni mormaniiru. Namoonni baay'een tarkaanfiin kun eenyummaa Filisxeem irratti xiyyeeffachuu fi haqa-dhabeessa ta'uu isaatiin mormii guddaa kaasaniiru.

title: Two US service members in Jordan killed in Iranian attack, US says
english: Two American military members lost their lives in Jordan following an assault involving Iranian missiles and drones. The United States Central Command officially confirmed the deaths on Saturday. This attack marks a significant escalation of tensions in the region.
amharic: በኢራን ሚሳኤሎች እና ድሮኖች በተፈጸመ ጥቃት ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች በዮርዳኖስ መገደላቸውን የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ አስታውቋል። አሜሪካ ጉዳዩን በይፋ ያረጋገጠች ሲሆን፣ ጥቃቱ በአካባቢው ያለውን ውጥረት የበለጠ ያባብሰዋል ተብሎ ይጠበቃል።
oromo: Humni giddugaleessa Ameerikaa akka ibsetti, haleellaa xiyyaara maleeyliin (drone) fi misayiloota Iraaniin raawwatameen loltootni Ameerikaa lama biyya Yordaanos keessatti ajjeefamaniiru. Ameerikaan du'a loltoota kanaa gabaasa baasteen mirkaneessiteetti. Haleellaan kunis naannichatti walitti bu'iinsi akka dabalu yaaddoo uumee jira.

title: What to expect after the US reimposes naval blockade on Iran’s ports?
english: The United States has reinstated a naval blockade on Iranian ports following the collapse of a brief peace agreement and renewed military clashes. This action effectively stops Iran from exporting its crude oil, which is expected to remove over 1.5 million barrels of oil from the global supply daily. Consequently, international energy markets are facing significant instability, with oil prices already rising to 90 dollars per barrel as global reserves come under further strain.
amharic: አሜሪካ በኢራን ወደቦች ላይ የነበረውን የባህር ላይ እገዳ እንደገና መጣሏን ተከትሎ በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ያለው ወታደራዊ ግጭት ተባብሷል። ይህ ውሳኔ የኢራንን የነዳጅ ምርት ወደ ውጭ የመላክ አቅም በማገዱ በየቀኑ ከ1.5 ሚሊዮን በርሜል በላይ ድፍድፍ ነዳጅ ከዓለም ገበያ እንዲጠፋ አድርጓል። በዚህም የተነሳ የዓለም የነዳጅ ዋጋ ወደ 90 ዶላር ከፍ ያለ ሲሆን፣ በዓለም አቀፍ የነዳጅ ክምችት ላይ ከፍተኛ ጫና ተፈጥሯል።
oromo: Ameerikaan walii galtee nagaa dura ture erga diigamee fi waraanni erga itti fufee booda, qarqara galaana Iran irratti uggura markabaa deebisteerti. Tarkaanfiin kun Iran boba'aa biyya alaa akka hin ergine kan dhorku ta'uun, guyyaatti boba'aan miliyoona 1.5 ol gabaa addunyaa irraa akka hir'atu taasiseera. Kanaafuu, gatiin boba'aa addunyaa toonii tokkoof gara dolaara 90tti ol kan ba'e yoo ta'u, kunis qusannoo boba'aa addunyaa irratti dhiibbaa guddaa uumera.

title: Armed groups attack Malian military convoy in Gao region
english: Malian military forces were ambushed by a coalition of separatist rebels and al-Qaeda-linked fighters in the northern Gao region. While the armed groups claim they caused significant casualties and captured soldiers, the Malian army has initiated a counter-operation to address the attack. This incident highlights the ongoing security crisis in Mali, which has lasted over a decade and significantly impacted the local population.
amharic: የማሊ ወታደሮች በሰሜናዊው ጋኦ ክልል በአማፂ ቡድኖች እና ከአልቃይዳ ጋር ግንኙነት ባላቸው ታጣቂዎች ጥቃት ደረሰባቸው። ታጣቂዎቹ በሠራዊቱ ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት ማድረሳቸውንና እስረኞችን መያዛቸውን ቢገልጹም፣ የማሊ መንግስት አፀፋዊ እርምጃ መጀመሩን አስታውቋል። ይህ ጥቃት ከአስር ዓመት በላይ የዘለቀውንና በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎችን ለችግር የዳረገውን የማሊ የጸጥታ ቀውስ ያሳያል።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Maali naannoo Ga'oo jedhamutti garee finxaaleyyii fi haleellaa garee al-Qaida waliin hidhata qaban irraan miidhaan irra ga'eera. Gareen hidhattootaa kun waraana Maali irra miidhaa guddaa geessisuu fi harka qabachuu kan ibsan yoo ta'u, waraanni Maali garuu tarkaanfii deebii fudhachuu eegaleera. Walitti bu'iinsi kun rakkoo nageenyaa Maali keessatti waggoota kudhan oliif itti fufee jiru fi namoota baay'ee miidhe daran kan jabeessuudha.

title: Belgium bans imports from Israeli settlements in occupied Palestine
english: The Belgian government has officially prohibited the import of products originating from Israeli settlements located in occupied Palestinian territories. This decision follows investigations revealing that many exporters frequently mislabeled settlement goods as being from Israel to bypass trade regulations. While the European Union remains divided on a collective policy, Belgium has joined other European nations in implementing this ban independently.
amharic: የቤልጂየም መንግሥት በተያዙ የፍልስጤም ግዛቶች ውስጥ በሚገኙ የእስራኤል ሰፈራዎች የሚመረቱ ምርቶች ወደ ሀገሪቱ እንዳይገቡ ከልክሏል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተላለፈው፣ ብዙ ላኪዎች የሰፈራ ምርቶችን የእስራኤል ውጤቶች እንደሆኑ አድርገው በሐሰት እንደሚሰይሙ የሚያሳዩ ምርመራዎች ከተካሄዱ በኋላ ነው። የአውሮፓ ህብረት በአጠቃላይ የንግድ እገዳ ላይ ስምምነት ላይ ባይደርስም፣ ቤልጂየም በተናጥል ይህንን እርምጃ በመውሰድ እንደ ስፔንና ሆላንድ ያሉ አገሮችን ተቀላቅላለች።
oromo: Mootummaan Beljiyam oomishaalee naannolee lafa Falasxiin qabamte keessatti argaman irraa oomishaman biyyatti galchu dhorkeera. Murteen kun kan darbe, oomishtoonni hedduun oomishaalee naannolee sanaa irraa dhufan akka Israa'el irraa dhufanitti gabaa irratti sobaan barreessuun seera darbaa akka turan qorannoon erga mirkaneeffamee booda. Gamtaan Awurooppaa dhimma kana irratti waliigaltee guutuu irra gahuu baatus, Beljiyam biyyoota akka Ispeen fi Hoolaandi faana hiriirtee dhorkaa kana of danda'uun hojii irra oolchiteetti.

title: Iran’s Khamenei says US president’s signature ‘worthless and invalid’
english: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has criticized recent US military actions against his country. He argued that the American government consistently fails to honor international commitments. Consequently, he declared that any promises or signatures provided by the US president carry no meaningful weight.
amharic: የኢራኑ ከፍተኛ መሪ አያቶላ አሊ ካሜኒ በኢራን ላይ የተፈጸሙትን የአሜሪካ ጥቃቶች በጠንካራ ሁኔታ አውግዘዋል። አሜሪካ ስምምነቶችን ደጋግማ በመጣሷ ምክንያት፣ የአሜሪካ ፕሬዝዳንት ፊርማ ምንም አይነት ዋጋ እንደሌለው ገልጸዋል። በመሆኑም የትኛውም የአሜሪካ ቃል ኪዳን ተዓማኒነት የሌለው መሆኑን አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Hoggantoonni olaanoo Iraan Ayatollah Alii Khameneen, haleellaa Ameerikaan biyyattii irratti raawwatte balaaleeffataniiru. Ameerikaan waliigaltee idil-addunyaa kabajuu dadhabuu isheetiin kan ka'e, mallattoon pireezidantii Ameerikaa gatii hin qabu jedhaniiru. Kanaafuu, waadaa kamiyyuu mootummaan Ameerikaa seenu amansiisaa miti jechuun ibsaniiru.

title: Qatar condemns Iran's latest attacks on Gulf countries 'in strongest terms'
english: Qatar has officially denounced recent Iranian military actions against Jordan, Bahrain, and Kuwait. The Qatari government described the assault on essential utility infrastructure in Kuwait as an unacceptable violation of boundaries. They expressed their strong disapproval of these ongoing hostilities in the region.
amharic: ቀጠር በቅርቡ ኢራን በዮርዳኖስ፣ በባህሬን እና በኩዌት ላይ የፈጸመችውን ጥቃት በጥብቅ አውግዛለች። የኩዌትን የኤሌክትሪክ እና የውሃ ማጣሪያ መሰረተ ልማቶች ኢላማ ማድረጉን ቀይ መስመርን እንደመተላለፍ የቆጠረው የቀጠር የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር፣ ድርጊቱን በጽኑ ተቃውሟል። ሀገሪቱ በቀጠናው እየተካሄደ ያለውን ይህን ጥቃት ተቀባይነት እንደሌለው አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Qatar hujii waraanaa dhiyeenya kana Iran biyyoota akka Yordaanos, Baahrayn fi Kuweet irratti raawwatte cimsitee balaaleffatteetti. Mootummaan Qatar miidhaa bu'uuraalee misoomaa kanneen akka ibsaa fi qulqulleessa bishaan qulqulleessuu Kuweet keessatti raawwatame sarbama daangaa seeraa ti jechuun ibseera. Qatar gochaalee diinummaa naannicha keessatti raawwatamaa jiran kana fudhatama kan hin qabne ta'uu ibsiteetti.

title: Venezuela quake death toll tops 5,000 as IMF releases emergency aid
english: The death toll from the major earthquakes that struck Venezuela's coast in late June has now exceeded 5,000, with thousands more injured and displaced. In response to the growing humanitarian crisis, the International Monetary Fund has provided $346 million in emergency aid to support recovery efforts. Meanwhile, the government is facing significant public criticism regarding the slow pace of its disaster relief operations.
amharic: በቬንዙዌላ የባህር ዳርቻ ላይ የተከሰተው ኃይለኛ የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ የሟቾችን ቁጥር ከ5,000 በላይ አድርሶታል፤ ከዚህም በላይ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎች ቆስለዋል እና መፈናቀላቸው ተገልጿል። እየተባባሰ የመጣውን የሰብአዊ ቀውስ ለመቅረፍ ዓለም አቀፍ የገንዘብ ድርጅት (IMF) 346 ሚሊዮን ዶላር የአስቸኳይ ጊዜ እርዳታ ለቋል። ይሁን እንጂ መንግሥት ለአደጋው የሰጠው ምላሽ ዘገምተኛ ነው በሚል በህዝቡ ዘንድ ከፍተኛ ትችት እየቀረበበት ይገኛል።
oromo: Muddee dhumaa keessa gara qarqara galaana Venazuweelaatti kan rukutee sochoostiin lafaa sun lubbuu namoota 5,000 ol galaafateera, namoonni kumaatamaan lakkaawwaman immoo miidhamaa fi buqqaa'anii jiru. Rakkoo namoomaa kana furuuf, Dhaabbata Maallaqaa Addunyaa (IMF) gargaarsa ariifachiisaa doolaara miliyoona 346 gadhiiseera. Ta'us, mootummaan hojii gargaarsa taasisaa jiru saffisa gahaa hin qabu jechuun ummanni baay'inaan komachaa jira.

title: Plumes of smoke rise over Kuwait after repeated Iranian attacks
english: Large clouds of smoke were seen over Kuwait following a series of Iranian military strikes in the Mangaf area. These attacks specifically hit a facility used for generating electricity and desalinating water. In response, Kuwaiti officials have urged the public to reduce their energy consumption while they manage the impact of the damage.
amharic: በኩዌት ማንጋፍ አካባቢ በደረሱ ተደጋጋሚ የኢራን ጥቃቶች ምክንያት በከተማዋ ሰማይ ላይ ከፍተኛ የጭስ ክምችት ታይቷል። ጥቃቱ የኤሌክትሪክ ኃይል ማመንጫ እና የውሃ ማጣሪያ ጣቢያን ያነጣጠረ ነበር። ይህንን ተከትሎ የኩዌት ባለስልጣናት የሀገሪቱን የኃይል አቅርቦት ለመቆጠብ ዜጎች ፍጆታቸውን እንዲቀንሱ ጥሪ አቅርበዋል።
oromo: Iran qondaaltota Kuweeyt irratti haleellaa geggeessiteen ergaa magaalaa Mangaf irratti aaruun guddaan mul’achuu jalqabee jira. Haleellaan kun bakka ibsaa fi bishaan qulqulleessan irratti kan xiyyeeffate yoo ta’u, mootummaan Kuweeyt hambaalee jiran qusachuuf akka tattaafatan ummata gaafataniiru.

title: US and Israel used Karim Khan misconduct claims to 'defang' ICC, says former EU top diplomat
english: Former EU diplomat Josep Borrell claims that the United States and Israel are using sexual misconduct allegations against ICC prosecutor Karim Khan as a pretext to weaken the court. Borrell warned that the Assembly of States Parties is being manipulated by procedural changes to force a vote on Khan's removal, despite a judicial panel finding insufficient evidence against him. He argues that this effort is a calculated move by both nations to neutralize the court's influence from within.
amharic: የአውሮፓ ህብረት የቀድሞ የውጭ ጉዳይ ኃላፊ ጆሴፕ ቦሬል፣ አሜሪካ እና እስራኤል በአለም አቀፍ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት ዋና አቃቤ ህግ ካሪም ካን ላይ የቀረበውን የፆታ ትንኮሳ ክስ ተጠቅመው ፍርድ ቤቱን ለማዳከም እየሰሩ ነው ብለዋል። ቦሬል ምንም እንኳን የፍርድ ቤቱ የህግ ባለሙያዎች በካን ላይ የቀረበው ማስረጃ በቂ እንዳልሆነ ቢገልጹም፣ አንዳንድ አካላት የአሰራር ለውጦችን በመጠቀም አቃቤ ህጉን ከስልጣን ለማንሳት እየተንቀሳቀሱ መሆኑን አስጠንቅቀዋል። ይህ አካሄድ ሁለቱ ሀገራት ፍርድ ቤቱን ከውስጥ ለመቆጣጠር የሚያደርጉት ጥረት አካል መሆኑን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Hoggantoonni siyaasaa duraanii kan gamtaa Awurooppaa Joosep Borrel, Ameerikaan fi Israa’el himata miidhaa saalaa kan qindeessaa seeraa mana murtii yakka addunyaa (ICC) Kaariim Khaan irratti dhiyaate fayyadamuun mana murtichaa laaffisuuf akka yaalan himaniiru. Borrel, gareen seeraa mana murtichaa ragaan Khaan irratti dhiyaate gahaa miti jedhee yoo murteesse illee, qaamoleen tokko tokko adeemsa seeraa jijjiiruun Khaan irratti tarkaanfii fudhachuuf yaalaa akka jiran ibsaniiru. Gochi kun biyyoota lamaan kunneen dhiibbaa mana murtichaa keessa taa'anii hir'isuuf mala ittiin hojjetan ta'uu ibsaniiru.

title: Iran says renewed US strikes killed at least 50 people
english: The Iranian government has reported that recent military attacks by the United States resulted in the deaths of at least 50 individuals. Additionally, over 500 people have sustained injuries during these operations. This incident highlights a significant escalation in the ongoing tensions between the two nations.
amharic: የኢራን መንግሥት በቅርቡ በተፈጸመ የአሜሪካ ጥቃት ቢያንስ 50 ሰዎች መገደላቸውን አስታውቋል። በተጨማሪም ከ500 በላይ የሚሆኑ ሰዎች ጉዳት እንደደረሰባቸው ተገልጿል። ይህ ክስተት በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ያለውን ውጥረት ይበልጥ ያባባሰው መሆኑን ያሳያል።
oromo: Mootummaan Iraan haleellaa Ameerikaan dhiheenya kana raawwatte keessa namoonni 50 ol ta'an lubbuun isaanii darbuusaa beeksisera. Kana malees, namoonni 500 ol ta'an miidhamuun ibsameera. Labsichi walitti bu'iinsa biyyoota lamaan gidduu jiru daran kan hammaate ta'uu agarsiisa.

title: Iran declares Islamabad agreement suspended, blames US violations
english: Iran has officially suspended its obligations under the Islamabad agreement, a deal previously established to reduce tensions with the United States. Tehran claims that the U.S. failed to honor the terms of the memorandum, which was meant to de-escalate military conflicts and lift maritime restrictions. Consequently, Iran no longer considers the Pakistan-brokered pact valid as direct hostilities between the two nations persist.
amharic: ኢራን ከዩናይትድ ስቴትስ ጋር የነበረውን ውጥረት ለመቀነስ ቀደም ሲል የተፈረመውን የኢስላማባድ ስምምነት ሙሉ በሙሉ ማገዷን አስታውቃለች። ቴህራን ውሳኔውን የወሰደችው ዋሽንግተን ስምምነቱን በመጣሷ ምክንያት እንደሆነ ገልጻለች። ይህ ስምምነት ወታደራዊ ግጭቶችን ለማስቆም እና የባህር ላይ እገዳዎችን ለማንሳት የታለመ ነበር፣ አሁን ግን በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ቀውስ በመቀጠሉ ኢራን ስምምነቱ ተግባራዊ እንደማይሆን አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Iiraan walii galtee Islamaabaad kan kanaan dura kan tolfame biyyoota lamaan gidduu waraana hir'isuuf ture hojii irra akka oolchu dhaabdeetti. Teheraan tarkaanfii kana kan fudhatte, Amerikaan akkaataa walii galtichaa kabajuu didde jechuun himachuudhaan dha. Walii galtichi sun waraana dhaabuu fi uggura galaana irraa kaasuu kan barbaade ture, ta'us amma giddutti walitti bu'iinsi waan itti fufeef Iiraan walii galtichi akka diigame beeksisiteetti.

title: Iraq signs 48 deals with US companies during PM’s visit to Washington
english: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi recently visited Washington, where he finalized 48 commercial agreements with major American firms like ExxonMobil, GE Vernova, and Chevron. A central part of these deals involves rebuilding a major oil pipeline connecting Iraq to Syria, which will allow Iraq to export oil through the Mediterranean instead of the Strait of Hormuz. These partnerships aim to modernize Iraq's energy and power sectors while strengthening its economic independence during a period of regional instability.
amharic: የኢራቅ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አሊ አል-ዛይዲ በዋሽንግተን ባደረጉት ጉብኝት ከዋና ዋና የአሜሪካ ኩባንያዎች ጋር 48 የንግድ ስምምነቶችን ተፈራርመዋል። ከስምምነቶቹ መካከል ዋናው ከኢራቅ ወደ ሶሪያ የሚዘረጋውን የነዳጅ ቧንቧ መስመር መልሶ መገንባት ሲሆን ይህም ኢራቅ ነዳጇን በሆርሙዝ ባህረ ሰላጤ ፋንታ በሜዲትራኒያን ባህር በኩል እንድትልክ ያስችላታል። እነዚህ አጋርነቶች የኢራቅን የኃይል ዘርፍ ዘመናዊ ከማድረግ ባሻገር በአካባቢው ካለው አለመረጋጋት አንጻር የአገሪቱን የኢኮኖሚ ነጻነት ለማጠናከር ያለሙ ናቸው።
oromo: Muummee ministiraa Iraaq Alii al-Zaydii gara Waashingitanitti imaluun, kampanota Ameerikaa guguddaa waliin walii galtee daldala 48 mallatteessaniiru. Walii galtee kana keessaa inni guddaan ijaarsa garaara boba'aa Iraaq gara Sooriyaatti geessu deebisanii ijaaruu dha; kunis Iraaq boba'aa ishee gara Garba Meeditiraaniyaanii fayyadamuun akka ergitu gargaara. Walii galteewwan kun damee anniisaa Iraaq ammayyeessuu fi yeroo rakkoo naannichaa kana keessatti of danda'iinsa dinagdee biyyattii jabeessuuf kan gumaachan dha.

title: China warns UK over British Steel nationalisation, demands fair resolution
english: The British government has officially taken control of the struggling British Steel company from the Chinese firm Jingye to prevent its collapse and secure thousands of jobs. China has expressed concerns regarding this move, warning that the nationalization could damage investor trust in the UK. The Chinese government is now demanding a fair resolution and financial compensation for the losses incurred by Jingye during their ownership.
amharic: የብሪታንያ መንግስት የብሪቲሽ ስቲል ኩባንያ እንዳይዘጋና በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰራተኞች የስራ እድል እንዳይጠፋ ከቻይናው ኩባንያ ጂንግዬ ሙሉ በሙሉ ወደ መንግስት ቁጥጥር ስር አውሎታል። ቻይና ይህንን እርምጃ በቅርበት እየተከታተለች ሲሆን፣ ውሳኔው በብሪታንያ ላይ ያላቸውን ባለሀብቶች አመኔታ ሊጎዳ እንደሚችል አስጠንቅቃለች። የቻይና የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር ብሪታንያ ለጂንግዬ ተገቢውን የካሳ ክፍያ በመፈጸም ፍትሃዊ መፍትሄ እንድትሰጥ ጠይቋል።
oromo: Mootummaan Biritish kan kufee jiru dhaabbata Biritish Stiil kun akka hin cufamneefi hojjettoota kumaan lakka’aman akka hin ganee, dhaabbaticha harka dhaabbata Chaayinaa Jingye irraa gara mootummaatti guutummaatti fudhateera. Chaayinaan tarkaanfii kana hordofaa jirtu yoo ta’u, gochi kun amantaa invastaraa kan Biritish irra jiru miidhuu danda’a jechuun akeekkachiisteetti. Mootummaan Chaayinaa Biritish rakkoo kana karaa haqa qabeessa ta’een furuufi miidhaa maallaqaa Jingye irra ga’eef kaffaltii beenyaa akka kennitu gaafachaa jirti.

title: Israeli strike kills six people in Gaza
english: An Israeli air raid recently targeted an apartment complex located on Naser Street in western Gaza City. The attack resulted in the deaths of six individuals. Reports confirm the incident occurred within the residential area.
amharic: የእስራኤል የአየር ጥቃት በጋዛ ከተማ በናሰር ጎዳና ላይ በሚገኝ የመኖሪያ ሕንጻ ላይ ጉዳት አድርሷል። ጥቃቱ ስድስት ሰዎችን ለህልፈት ዳርጓል። የተጎጂዎቹ መኖሪያ በከተማዋ ምዕራባዊ ክፍል የሚገኝ መሆኑ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Humni waraana Israa'el magaalaa Gaazaa, karaa Naaseritti argamu tokko irratti xiyyaaraan haleellaa raawwateera. Haleellaa kanaan namoonni ja'a lubbuun isaanii darbeera. Miidhaan kun kan ga'e mana jireenyaa magaalattii kutaa dhihaa keessatti argamu irratti dha.

title: Qatar condemns Iranian attacks on Gulf countries
english: Qatar has officially denounced recent Iranian military actions against Bahrain, Kuwait, and Jordan. The Qatari government labeled these strikes as a serious violation of national sovereignty and international legal standards. Furthermore, Doha described the aggression as a risky escalation that undermines regional stability and peaceful neighborly relations.
amharic: ኳታር በባህሬን፣ በኩዌት እና በዮርዳኖስ ላይ ኢራን የፈጸመችውን ጥቃት በይፋ አውግዛለች። የኳታር መንግስት ድርጊቱን የሀገራትን ሉዓላዊነት የጣሰ እና የአለም አቀፍ ህጎችን የሚቃረን አደገኛ ድርጊት ሲል ገልጾታል። በተጨማሪም ይህ ጥቃት በክልሉ ውስጥ ያለውን ሰላም አደጋ ላይ የሚጥል እና የመልካም ጉርብትና መርህን የሚፃረር መሆኑን አስታውቋል።
oromo: Qatar tarkaanfii waraana Iraan biyyoota Bahrain, Kuwait fi Jordan irratti fudhatte cimsitee balaaleffatteetti. Mootummaan Qatar gocha kana cabsii mirga abbaa biyyummaa fi cabsuu seera idil-addunyaa akka ta'e ibseera. Akkasumas, qophiin kun nageenya naannichaa kan booressu fi hariiroo gaarii ollummaa kan miidhu akka ta'e beeksisaniiru.

title: Iran declares Islamabad agreement suspended, blames US violations
english: Iran has officially suspended the Islamabad agreement, a deal previously designed to de-escalate tensions and stop hostilities between Tehran and Washington. Iranian officials claim the United States breached the terms of the agreement, leading them to abandon their commitments to focus on national defense. As the conflict intensifies, recent US strikes have damaged vital civilian infrastructure, resulting in significant casualties and water supply disruptions.
amharic: ኢራን በቴህራን እና በዋሽንግተን መካከል ያለውን ግጭት ለማስቆም በፓኪስታን አደራዳሪነት ተደርሶ የነበረውን የኢስላማባድ ስምምነት በይፋ ማቋረጧን አስታውቃለች። የኢራን ባለስልጣናት አሜሪካ ስምምነቱን በመጣሷ ምክንያት፣ ሀገራቸው ከአሁን በኋላ ስምምነቱን እንደማትቀበል እና ለሀገር መከላከያ ስራዎች ትኩረት እንደምትሰጥ ገልጸዋል። በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ግጭት እየተባባሰ በመሄዱ፣ የአሜሪካ ጥቃቶች በሰላማዊ ሰዎች እና በውሃ ማጣሪያ መሰረተ ልማቶች ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት እያደረሱ ነው።
oromo: Iraan waliigaltee Islaamaabaad, kan duraan deemsa waraanaa fi walitti bu'iinsa Tehraanii fi Waashingitan gidduu jiru tasgabbeessuuf taasifame, guutummaatti addaan kutuu ishee beeksisiteetti. Aangootonni Iraan akka jedhanitti, Ameerikaan waliigaltee sana waan cabsiteef, isaanis dirqama isaanii bahuu dhiisanii biyya isaanii ittisuurratti xiyyeeffachaa jiru. Walitti bu'iinsi kun daran hammaachaa waan jiruuf, rukuttaa waraanaa Ameerikaan raawwatte keessaatti miidhaan qabeenyaa fi lubbuu irratti ga'aa jira.

title: Iran suspends agreement with Washington after 'US violations'
english: Iran has officially halted its participation in the Islamabad memorandum of understanding with the United States. Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi claims that American actions have violated the terms of the deal. Consequently, Iran states it is prioritizing national defense over these diplomatic commitments.
amharic: ኢራን ከአሜሪካ ጋር የነበራትን የኢስላማባድ የመግባቢያ ስምምነት በይፋ ማቋረጧን አስታውቃለች። የኢራን ምክትል የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ካዘም ጋሪባባዲ እንደተናገሩት፣ የአሜሪካ ድርጊቶች የስምምነቱን ውሎች በመጣሳቸው ይህ እርምጃ መወሰዱን ገልጸዋል። በዚህም ምክንያት፣ ኢራን ከአገሪቷ መከላከያ ጋር በተያያዘ ስራ በዝቶባት ስምምነቱን መተግበር እንዳቆመች አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Iiraan waliigaltee yaadannoo Islamabad kan Yunaayitid Isteetsii wajjin qabdu addaan kutuu ishee ifa gooteetti. Ministirri Ittaanaa Dhimma Alaa Iiraan Kaazem Gaaribaabaadii, gochi Ameerikaa waliigaltee kana kan cabse ta'uu ibsaniiru. Kanaafuu, Iiraan biyya ishee ittisuuf xiyyeeffannoo kennuun, dirqama waliigaltee sanaa bahuu akka dhaabde ibsiteetti.

title: Kuwait Petroleum Corporation reports damage and injuries from Iranian attacks
english: The Kuwait Petroleum Corporation recently reported that an oil facility was struck by several Iranian attacks. The incident resulted in notable physical damage to the site. Additionally, some workers sustained injuries during these strikes.
amharic: የኩዌት የነዳጅ ኮርፖሬሽን በኢራን በተደጋጋሚ በተፈጸሙ ጥቃቶች የነዳጅ ማጣሪያ ተቋሙ መመታቱን አስታውቋል። ይህ ጥቃት በንብረት ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት ያደረሰ ሲሆን በበርካታ ሰራተኞች ላይም የአካል ጉዳት አስከትሏል።
oromo: Hirmaannaan Biraayii Kuweyt buufanni isaanii tokko weerara Iran irraa irra deddeebi'ee gaggeeffame kanaan miidhamuu beeksise. Weerara kanaan qabeenyarratti miidhaan guddaan kan ga'e yoo ta'u, hojjettoota tokko tokkorraas miidhaan qaamaa ga'eera.

title: Top German conservative quits after surrogacy sparks backlash within party
english: Jens Spahn, a prominent leader in Germany's Christian Democratic Union, has resigned from his parliamentary role after facing backlash for becoming a father through surrogacy. Because his party maintains a strict ban on surrogacy, his personal choice was seen by colleagues as inconsistent with his political position. While surrogacy is illegal within Germany, Spahn had pursued the process abroad, ultimately leading him to conclude that his family life and political responsibilities could not coexist.
amharic: የጀርመን ክርስቲያን ዴሞክራቲክ ዩኒየን ከፍተኛ መሪ የሆኑት ጄንስ ስፓን በውክልና ልጅ መውለዳቸውን ተከትሎ በተፈጠረ ውዝግብ ከኃላፊነታቸው ለቀዋል። ፓርቲያቸው በውክልና ልጅ መውለድን የሚቃወም በመሆኑ፣ ስፓን የወሰዱት እርምጃ ከፓርቲው አቋም ጋር የሚጋጭ ሆኖ ተገኝቷል። በጀርመን በውክልና ልጅ መውለድ ሕገወጥ ቢሆንም፣ ስፓን ይህን ያደረጉት በውጭ አገር በመሆኑ ነበር። ሆኖም፣ ይህ የግል ውሳኔያቸው ከፖለቲካ ሥልጣናቸው ጋር የሚጣጣም አይደለም በማለት ከኃላፊነታቸው ለመልቀቅ ወስነዋል።
oromo: Hoggantoonni cimaan gamtaa Kiristiyaan Demokiraatikii Jarmanii, Jens Sipaani, daa'ima haadha birootin (surrogacy) argachuun isaanii mormii cimaa keessa fi ala irraa isaan mudachuun walqabatee aangoo isaanii gadhiisaniiru. Gamtaan siyaasaa isanii kun daa'ima haadha birootin argachuu waan mormuuf, tarkaanfiin kun qajeelfama paartii isaanii waliin akka walfaallessutti ilaalameera. Jarmanitti haadha birootin daa'ima argachuun seeraan kan dhorkame yoo ta'u, Sipaani garuu adeemsa kana biyya alatti raawwatan; haata'u malee, murteen kun aangoo siyaasaa isaanii waliin wal hin qabatu jechuun gadi bahuu filataniiru.

title: FIFA World Cup: Spain vs Argentina – What to know ahead of the final
english: The 2026 FIFA World Cup concludes this Sunday in New Jersey with a highly anticipated final between Argentina and Spain. This match features a compelling contrast between Argentina’s high-scoring offense and Spain’s exceptionally strong defense. The game also highlights a historic generational matchup between the legendary Lionel Messi and rising star Lamine Yamal.
amharic: የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ የፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በዚህ እሁድ በአርጀንቲና እና በስፔን መካከል በኒው ጀርሲ ይካሄዳል። ጨዋታው የአርጀንቲናን ጠንካራ አጥቂ መስመር እና የስፔንን ጠንካራ የተከላካይ ክፍል የሚያገናኝ ነው። ይህ የፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በታዋቂው ሊዮኔል ሜሲ እና በወጣቱ ኮከብ ላሚን ያማል መካከል የሚደረግ አስደናቂ የተውልድ ፍልሚያም ነው።
oromo: Qophiin waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 kan FIFA Dilbata dhufu kana New Jersey keessatti tapha xumuraa Arjentiinaa fi Ispeen gidduutti godhamuun xumurama. Taphi kun miilla Arjentiinaa kan goolii baay'ee galchuu fi ittisa Ispeen kan cimaa ta'e walitti fida. Akkasumas, taphi kun taphataa beekamaa Lionel Messi fi dorgomaa dargaggeessaa Lamine Yamal gidduutti kan godhamu ta'uun isaa fiilmii dhaloota lamaa wal-keessaa fakkaata.

title: Death toll from Uganda school bus crash rises to 24
english: The death toll from a tragic bus accident involving students from King David Junior School in Uganda has increased to 24 after three more children passed away. The bus, which was returning from a school trip, crashed in the Kapchorwa district after the driver lost control and hit a rock. In response to this and other recent accidents, the Ugandan government has suspended all school trips nationwide to conduct a full safety investigation.
amharic: በዩጋንዳ የኪንግ ዴቪድ ጁኒየር ትምህርት ቤት ተማሪዎችን የያዘ አውቶቡስ ላይ በደረሰው አደጋ ህይወታቸው ያለፈ ሰዎች ቁጥር ወደ 24 ከፍ ብሏል። ከተማሪዎች ጉዞ መልስ የነበረው አውቶቡሱ በአሽከርካሪው ቁጥጥር ስር መዋል አቅቶት ድንጋይ በመግጨቱ ነው አደጋው የተከሰተው። መንግስት ይህንን አሳዛኝ ሁኔታ ተከትሎ አደጋውን ለመመርመር እና የደህንነት ሁኔታውን ለማጣራት በትምህርት ቤቶች የሚደረጉ የጉዞ ፕሮግራሞችን በሀገር አቀፍ ደረጃ አግዷል።
oromo: Uganda keessatti balaa konkolaataa manneen barnootaa King David Junior School irra gaheen lubbuun namoota 24 darbeera. Konkolaataan kun daa'imman gara mana barumsatti deebisaa utuu jiruu, konkolaachisaan to'annoo dhabee dhagaa rukutuun isaa ibsameera. Balaa kana hordofee, mootummaan biyyattii qorannoo nageenyaa gaggeessuuf jecha imala mana barumsaa kamiyyuu guutuu biyyattiitti akka dhaabatu ajajeera.

title: Iran accuses US of striking critical infrastructure as war intensifies
english: Tensions between the United States and Iran have escalated sharply after a week of intensified military strikes. American attacks on critical Iranian facilities, including a major desalination plant, have left thousands without water, prompting Iran to retaliate with drone and missile strikes against U.S.-allied infrastructure in Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan. These recent events follow the collapse of a peace agreement, leading to a dangerous cycle of attacks that increasingly target essential civilian utilities.
amharic: የአሜሪካ እና የኢራን ግጭት ከአንድ ሳምንት በላይ በዘለቀው የአየር ጥቃት አሳሳቢ ደረጃ ላይ ደርሷል። አሜሪካ በኢራን የውኃ ማጣሪያ ጣቢያ ላይ ባደረሰችው ጥቃት ለብዙ ሺህ ሰዎች የውኃ አቅርቦት የተቋረጠ ሲሆን፣ ኢራንም በምላሹ በኩዌት፣ በባህሬን እና በዮርዳኖስ በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ አጋር ተቋማት ላይ ሚሳይል እና ድሮን ጥቃቶችን ሰንዝራለች። ይህ ሁኔታ የተፈጠረው የሁለቱ አገራት የሰላም ስምምነት መፍረሱን ተከትሎ ሲሆን፣ ጥቃቶቹም በሲቪል መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ እያተኮሩ መሆናቸው ስጋትን ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Walitti buutiin Ameerikaa fi Iraan gidduu jiru erga waliigalteen nagaa diigamee booda waraana hamaa keessa seeneera. Ameerikaan buufatawwan gurguddoo Iraan irratti haleellaa raawwattee qulqulleeffannaa bishaan dhugaatii irratti miidhaa geessisuun namoonni kumaatamaan lakkaa’aman bishaan dhabaniiru. Iraanis deebii kanaaf jecha biyyoota Ameerikaa waliin hidhata qaban kanneen akka Kuweyt, Baahreeyn fi Yordaanoos irratti haleellaa xiyyaara maleeyyuu fi mizaayilii raawwachuun buufatawwan bishaanii fi humna ibsaa irratti miidhaa geessisteerti.

title: Ukrainian strikes hit Russian logistics center
english: Ukrainian drone attacks targeted two large warehouses belonging to the Russian retailer Wildberries located in the Moscow and Tambov regions. The strikes resulted in the deaths of nine individuals and left many others injured. Officials reported that this operation was part of a broader offensive involving hundreds of drones sent toward the Moscow area.
amharic: የዩክሬን ድሮኖች በሞስኮ እና በታምቦቭ ክልሎች በሚገኙ የሩሲያ የችርቻሮ ኩባንያ ዋይልድቤሪስ መጋዘኖች ላይ ጥቃት ሰንዝረዋል። በዚህ ጥቃት ዘጠኝ ሰዎች ሲሞቱ በርካቶች ደግሞ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። ባለስልጣናት እንደገለጹት ጥቃቱ በሞስኮ አካባቢ ከተካሄደው የ370 ድሮኖች ዘመቻ አካል ነው።
oromo: Humni waraana Yukreeni, laayiiwwan (drones) fayyadamuun bakkeewwan kuusaa meeshaa gurguddaa kan dhaabbata gurgurtaa Rooshiiyaa 'Wildberries' kanneen naannoowwan Moskoo fi Taambovitti argaman irratti haleellaa raawwateera. Haleellaa kanaan namoonni sagal lubbuun isaanii yoo darbu, namoonni hedduun immoo madaa'aniiru. Qondaalonni akka ibsanitti, haleellaan kun duula laayiiwwan 370 fayyadamuun naannoo Moskootti geggeeffame keessaa tokko dha.

title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
english: Ukrainian drone strikes on two major Russian Wildberries warehouses have resulted in eight deaths and over 60 injuries. President Zelensky stated the targeted facilities were used for military logistics, including the production of drone components. These attacks were described as a direct response to recent Russian strikes against civilian infrastructure within Ukraine.
amharic: ዩክሬን በሩሲያ ትልቁ የኦንላይን መገበያያ ኩባንያ በሆነው በዋይልድቤሪስ ሁለት መጋዘኖች ላይ በፈጸመችው የድሮን ጥቃት ስምንት ሰዎች መሞታቸውንና ከ60 በላይ የሚሆኑት መቁሰላቸውን ባለስልጣናት አስታወቁ። የዩክሬኑ ፕሬዚዳንት ቮሎዲሚር ዘለንስኪ እንደገለጹት ጥቃቱ ያነጣጠረው ለወታደራዊ አገልግሎትና ለድሮን መለዋወጫ ማምረቻነት በሚውሉ ማዕከላት ላይ ነው። ይህ እርምጃ በዩክሬን ሲቪል መሰረተ ልማቶች ላይ ለሚሰነዘረው የሩሲያ ጥቃት አጸፋዊ ምላሽ መሆኑን ተጠቅሷል።
oromo: Ukraynan buufataalee gurgurtaa meeshaalee kan 'Wildberries' jedhamu kan Raashiyaa keessatti argaman lama irratti dhukaasa 'drone' gaggeessiteen lubbuun namoota saddeet darbee, namoonni 60 ol immoo miidhamaniiru. Preezdaant Zelenski akka jedhanitti, bakkeen kun meeshaalee waraanaa fi qindaagina 'drone' oomishuuf kan ooluu dha. Miidhaan kun immoo qindoomina Raashiyaan buufataalee qilleensaa fi meeshaalee bu'uuraa kan Ukraynaa irratti raawwattuuf deebii kenname akka ta'e ibsameera.

title: India achieves milestone with launch of first private-sector orbital rocket
english: India has reached a major space exploration milestone by successfully launching its first private-sector orbital rocket, the Vikram-1. Developed by the startup Skyroot Aerospace, the mission proved the vehicle's capability to deploy payloads into orbit while testing advanced onboard technology. This achievement highlights India's growing influence in the global space industry and marks a significant step for its private aerospace startups.
amharic: ህንድ የመጀመሪያውን የግል ሴክተር ምህዋር ሮኬት 'ቪክራም-1'ን በተሳካ ሁኔታ በማምጠቅ በጠፈር ምርምር ታሪኳ ትልቅ ምዕራፍ ላይ ደርሳለች። በስካይሩት ኤሮስፔስ የተሰራው ይህ ሮኬት፣ ጭነቶችን ወደ ምህዋር የማድረስ አቅሙን ያረጋገጠ ሲሆን የላቁ ቴክኖሎጂዎችንም ሞክሯል። ይህ ስኬት ህንድ በአለም አቀፍ የጠፈር ኢንዱስትሪ ውስጥ ያላትን ተጽዕኖ ከማሳደጉም በላይ ለግል የጠፈር ኩባንያዎቿ ትልቅ መነቃቃትን ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Indiyaan rookeettii oomisha dhuunfaa kan jalqabaa 'Vikram-1' jedhamu haala milkaa'ina qabuun gara samitti erguun seenaa hojjechaa jirti. Rookeettichi kan hojjetame dhaabbata 'Skyroot Aerospace' tiin yoo ta'u, meeshaalee gara orbititti erguuf dandeettii qabu akka qabu mirkaneesseera. Milkaa'inni kun Indiyaan industirii samii addunyaa keessatti qooda olaanaa akka qabaattu kan taasisuufi dhaabbilee dhuunfaa biyyattii hedduufis haala mijataa uuma.

title: India’s salt workers: The human cost of the world’s most popular seasoning
english: India is a major global salt producer, yet this industry relies on the difficult labor of the marginalized Agariva community in the Gujarat salt deserts. These workers endure extreme environments to harvest the salt consumed by people around the world. A recent investigation highlights the hidden human struggle and severe hardships behind this massive export market.
amharic: ህንድ የዓለማችን ትልቁ የጨው አምራች ሀገራት አንዷ ብትሆንም፣ ይህ ኢንዱስትሪ ግን በጉጃራት የጨው በረሃዎች ውስጥ በሚኖሩ አጋሪቫ በተባሉ ተهمለልተረሱ ማህበረሰብ አባላት ላይ የተመሰረተ ነው። እነዚህ ሰራተኞች በዓለም ዙሪያ ለሚጠቀሰው ጨው አሰቃቂ የስራ ሁኔታዎችን ይቋቋማሉ። አንድ አዲስ ዘገባም ከዚህ ግዙፍ የንግድ ገበያ በስተጀርባ ያለውን የሰዎች ስቃይ እና ከባድ ችግር ያጋልጣል።
oromo: Indiyaan oomisha soogiddaan addunyaarratti sadarkaa ol aanaa irratti kan argamtu ta’us, hojiin kun gargaarsa hawaasa Agarivaa jedhamuu fi gammoojjii Gujarat keessa jiraatan irratti kan hirkateedha. Hojjettoonni kunneen soogidda addunyaa mara bira gahuu qopheessuuf haala rakkisaa keessatti hojjetu. Qorannoon haaraan tokko akka ibsutti, gabaa kana duubatti hiyyummaa fi gidiraa guddaan hojjettoota kanaa akka jiru saaxileera.

title: Ukrainian drone attacks on Russia kill at least 8, wound dozens
english: Ukrainian drone strikes targeting Russian warehouses have resulted in the deaths of at least eight civilians and left dozens wounded. Ukrainian officials stated that these sites were being used to support Russian military production, including drone and navigation components. This event represents one of the deadliest drone attacks within Russian territory since the war began over three years ago.
amharic: በሩሲያ መጋዘኖች ላይ የተሰነዘረው የዩክሬን ድሮን ጥቃት ቢያንስ ስምንት ንፁሀን ዜጎችን ገድሎ በደርዘን የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎችን አቁስሏል። የዩክሬን ባለስልጣናት እነዚህ መጋዘኖች ለወታደራዊ አገልግሎት የሚውሉ ድሮኖችንና ሌሎች መሳሪያዎችን ለማምረት ይጠቀሙባቸው እንደነበር ገልጸዋል። ይህ ጥቃት ጦርነቱ ከተጀመረ ወዲህ በሩሲያ ግዛት ውስጥ ከተፈጸሙት እጅግ አደገኛ ጥቃቶች አንዱ ተደርጎ ተወስዷል።
oromo: Humni Yukreeniifi rukuttaa isaa buufataalee meeshaalee biyya Raashiyaatti taasiseen namoonni yoo xiqqaate saddeet yoo du'an, hedduun isaanii immoo madaa'aniiru. Bulchiinsi Yukreen akka jedhutti, buufataaleen rukutaman kunneen meeshaalee waraanaa fi teeknoolojii ishee deeggaruuf oolu turan. Gochi kun waraanni kun erga eegalee, lola biyya Raashiyaa keessatti taasifame keessaa kan hangafaafi namoota hedduu miidhe ta'uun ibsameera.

title: Indian police forcibly hospitalise activist after 20-day hunger strike
english: Indian authorities have forcibly taken activist Sonam Wangchuk to a hospital after he spent 20 days on a hunger strike protesting corruption in the nation's exam system. While police stated the move was necessary for his health, the action caused a minor scuffle with demonstrators supporting his call for the Education Minister to resign. Wangchuk remains a central figure in a growing youth-led movement demanding accountability following widespread issues and exam paper leaks within India's education sector.
amharic: የህንድ ባለስልጣናት በሀገሪቱ የፈተና ስርዓት ላይ ያለውን ሙስና በመቃወም ለ20 ቀናት የረሃብ አድማ ላይ የነበሩትን አክቲቪስት ሶናም ዋንግቹክን በግድ ወደ ሆስፒታል ወስደዋቸዋል። ፖሊስ ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው ለጤንነታቸው ሲባል እንደሆነ ቢገልጽም፣ የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩ ስልጣን እንዲለቁ በሚጠይቁ ደጋፊዎቻቸው እና በፖሊስ መካከል መጠነኛ ግጭት ተፈጥሯል። የትምህርት ዘርፉን አሰራር ለማስተካከል በሚደረገው የለውጥ ንቅናቄ ውስጥ ዋንግቹክ ዋነኛ ሰው ሆነው ቀጥለዋል።
oromo: Hoggantoonni Indiyaa qabsaa'aa Sonam Waangchuuk, sirna qormaata biyyattii keessatti malaammaltummaa jiru mormuun guyyaa 20f erga soomaa turanii booda, humnaan gara hospitaalaa geessaniiru. Poolisiin tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame fayyaa isaaniif yaaduun akka ta'e ibseus, gochi kun deggertoota ministira barnootaa ari'uuf gaafachaa turan waliin walitti bu'iinsa xiqqoo uumeera. Waangchuuk rakkoolee fi hatama qormaataa irratti hundaa'ee mootummaa irraa jijjiirama gaafachaa jiru mootummaa irratti dhiibbaa gochaa jiru.

title: Argentina’s New York fans share hopes before 2026 World Cup final
english: As Argentina prepares to face Spain in the 2026 World Cup final near New York City, Argentinian fans in the Queens neighborhood are celebrating their heritage. Although the local immigrant community has shifted over time, residents are decorating their streets in national colors to honor their team and football icons like Messi and Maradona. Longtime fans view these traditions as a vital way to stay connected to their roots and keep their national pride alive.
amharic: አርጀንቲና በኒውዮርክ አቅራቢያ በሚካሄደው የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ የፍጻሜ ጨዋታ ከስፔን ጋር ለመጫወት ስትዘጋጅ፣ በኒውዮርክ ኩዊንስ አካባቢ የሚኖሩ የአርጀንቲና ደጋፊዎች ባህላቸውን በደስታ እየገለጹ ነው። ምንም እንኳን በጊዜ ሂደት የአካባቢው የስደተኛ ማህበረሰብ ቢቀየርም፣ ነዋሪዎቹ ለቡድናቸው እና እንደ ሜሲ እና ማራዶና ላሉ የእግር ኳስ ኮከቦች ያላቸውን ክብር ለመግለጽ ጎዳናዎቻቸውን በብሔራዊ ቀለማቸው እያጌጡ ይገኛሉ። የረጅም ጊዜ ደጋፊዎች እነዚህን ወጎች ከትውልድ አገራቸው ጋር ያላቸውን ግንኙነት ለማጠናከር እና ብሔራዊ ኩራታቸውን ለማሳየት እንደ አስፈላጊ መንገድ ይመለከቱታል።
oromo: Arjantiinaan tapha xumuraa waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 magaalaa Niiyuu Yoorki biratti Ispeen wajjin taphachuuf qophaa'aa jirtu kana hordofee, namoonni Niiyuu Yoorki keessa jiraatan lammii Arjantiinaa ta'an aadaa isaanii kabajaa jiru. Yeroo dheeraa keessatti hawaasni godaantotaa bakka sanaa jijjiiramus, jiraattonni magaalaa sanaa garee isaanii fi taphattoota beekamoo akka Meesii fi Maaraadoonaaf kabaja qaban agarsiisuuf daandiiwwan isaanii halluu biyyoolessaa isaaniin faayaa jiru. Deeggartoonni waggoota dheeraaf garee kana hordofan, aadaan kun hidda isaanii waliin walitti dhufeenya qabaachuufi boona biyyoolessaa isaanii itti fufsiisuuf akka fayyadu dubbatu.

title: Watch FIFA World Cup: Messi, Rodri comment ahead of Argentina-Spain final
english: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is reaching its climax with a highly anticipated final match between Argentina and Spain. Ahead of the game, star players Lionel Messi and Rodri have shared their thoughts and expectations for the showdown. Coverage of this major event includes highlights, match analysis, and reactions from the teams as they prepare for the trophy decider.
amharic: የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ በአርጀንቲና እና በስፔን መካከል በሚደረገው ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ ወደ ከፍተኛ ደረጃ ደርሷል። ከጨዋታው በፊት ታዋቂዎቹ ተጫዋቾች ሊዮኔል ሜሲ እና ሮድሪ ስለ ፍጻሜው ያላቸውን እይታ እና ግምት ገልጸዋል። ይህ ዘገባ ቡድኖቹ ለዋንጫ በሚያደርጉት ወሳኝ ፍልሚያ ዙሪያ ያሉ መረጃዎችን፣ ግምገማዎችን እና የተጫዋቾችን አስተያየት ያካትታል።
oromo: Waliqixaan Waancaa Addunyaa FIFA bara 2026 xumura isaa irra kan gahe yoo ta'u, taphni xumuraa biyyoota Arjantiin fi Ispeen gidduutti taasifamaa jira. Taphatoonni beekamoon Liyonel Mesii fi Rodriin tapha kana ilaalchisee yaada isaanii fi eeggannoo qaban ibsaniiru. Gabaasni kun gareewwan kun waancicha fudhachuuf qophiirra jiran ilaalchisee ibsa, qorannoo taphaa fi yaada taphatootaa of keessatti qabata.

title: Space start-up launches India’s first commercial rocket designed for orbit
english: India-based company Skyroot Aerospace successfully launched its Vikram-1 rocket, marking the country's first private orbital mission. This achievement makes India the third nation globally to host a private space company capable of reaching orbit. The startup aims to provide a flexible, taxi-like service for satellite operators, significantly reducing the wait times and logistical hurdles typically associated with space launches.
amharic: የህንድዋ ስካይሩት ኤሮስፔስ ኩባንያ ቪክራም-1 የተባለውን ሮኬት ወደ ምህዋር በማስወንጨፍ የአገሪቱን የመጀመሪያው የግል የጠፈር ተልዕኮ በስኬት አጠናቋል። ይህ ክንውን ህንድ ወደ ምህዋር መድረስ የሚችል የግል የጠፈር ኩባንያ ካላቸው ጥቂት አገራት መካከል እንድትሆን አስችሏታል። ኩባንያው ሳተላይቶችን ወደ ጠፈር መላክን እንደ ታክሲ አገልግሎት ፈጣን እና ተለዋዋጭ በማድረግ ረገድ ለደንበኞች የረጅም ጊዜ የመጠባበቂያ ጊዜን የሚቀንስ መፍትሄ ለመስጠት ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Dhaabbanni ‘Skyroot Aerospace’ jedhamu kan Indiyaa, rookeettii ‘Vikram-1’ jedhamu gara samii oofuu dhaan milkaa’ina seena qabeessa galmeesseera. Kanaanis Indiyaan biyya sadaffaa addunyaa kan dhaabbata dhuunfaa gara samii rookeettii erguu danda’u qabdu taateetti. Dhaabbatichi tajaajila ergaa hawaa akka taaksii salphaa fi saffisaa ta’etti kennuuf karoora qaba; kunis namoota satalaayitii erganuf yeroo dheeraa eeguu hafee tajaajila filannoo isaanii ta’e akka argatan gargaara.

title: World Cup final: Spain vs Argentina – Which team has best chance to win?
english: The 2026 World Cup final will feature a high-stakes match between Spain and Argentina. Defending champions Argentina are heavily reliant on Lionel Messi, who remains their primary goal threat and tactical centerpiece. Both teams have shown distinct strengths as they prepare to compete for the championship title in this final game.
amharic: የ2026ቱ የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ስፔንን ከአርጀንቲና ያገናኛል። የዓለም ዋንጫውን በመከላከል ላይ ያሉት አርጀንቲናውያን በዋናነት በሊዮኔል ሜሲ ብቃት ላይ የተመሰረቱ ሲሆን፣ ሜሲም በውድድሩ ጠንካራ የግብ አስቆጣሪነት አቅሙ ቡድኑን እየመራ ይገኛል። ሁለቱም ቡድኖች የሻምፒዮናውን ዋንጫ ለማንሳት ጠንካራ ዝግጅት እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Fiinaliin Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2026 biyyoota Ispeeniifi Arjentiinaa walitti fida. Qabxii gaariin qabanii kan dorgomaa jiran Arjentiinonni, injifannoo isaanii kan hundeesse fi dandeettii taphataa isaanii Liyooneel Mesii irratti kan xiyyeeffate dha. Gareewwan lamaanuu waancaa kana fudhachuuf qophii cimaa gochaa jiru.

title: Palestine football fans honour Egyptian coach Hossam Hassan
english: Football supporters of the Palestinian club Shabab Al-Khaleel recently displayed a banner to express their appreciation for Egyptian coach Hossam Hassan. This tribute was made in recognition of his public display of solidarity, specifically when he held up a Palestinian flag following an Egyptian victory against Australia. The fans wanted to acknowledge his ongoing support for the Palestinian people through this gesture.
amharic: የፍልስጤሙ ክለብ ሻባብ አል-ካሊል ደጋፊዎች ለግብፁ አሰልጣኝ ሆሳም ሀሰን ያላቸውን አክብሮት በሰንደቅ አላማ ገልጸዋል። ይህ የሆነው አሰልጣኙ ግብፅ አውስትራሊያን ካሸነፈች በኋላ የፍልስጤምን ባንዲራ ከፍ በማድረግ ላሳዩት ድጋፍ ነው። ደጋፊዎቹ አሰልጣኙ ለፍልስጤም ህዝብ ላሳዩት አጋርነት ምስጋናቸውን በዚህ መልኩ አቅርበዋል።
oromo: Deeggartoonni kilabii kubbaa miilaa Palestine Shabab Al-Khaleel leenjisaa biyya Masrii Hossam Hassan gaarummaa inni Palestinef qabuuf kabaja isaanii ibsataniiru. Hundi kun kan ta'e erga gareen Masrii Awustiraaliyaa injifatee booda, leenjisaan sun alaabaa Palestine qilleensa ol kaasuudhaan deggersa isaa erga ibsee booda dha. Deeggartoonni kun gocha isaatiin gamachuudhaan galata isaa ibsatan.

title: World Cup final weekend: France vs England prediction, schedule, news
english: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is nearing its conclusion with only two matches left to play. France and England will compete for third place, while Spain and Argentina face off in the final on Sunday. As a special addition this year, the winning team will receive custom-made championship rings along with the traditional trophy.
amharic: የ2026ቱ የፊፋ ዓለም ዋንጫ ወደ ማጠናቀቂያው ተቃርቧል። ፈረንሳይ እና እንግሊዝ ለሶስተኛ ደረጃ ሲጫወቱ፣ ስፔን እና አርጀንቲና ደግሞ እሁድ እለት ለዋንጫ ፍልሚያ ይገጥማሉ። በዘንድሮው ውድድር አሸናፊው ቡድን ከተለመደው ዋንጫ በተጨማሪ ልዩ የሆነ የሻምፒዮና ቀለበት እንደሚበረከትለት ተገልጿል።
oromo: Qophiin waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 xumura isaa irra ga'ee jira. Faransaay fi Ingiliiz iddoo sadaffaaf kan taphatan yoo ta'u, Ispeen fi Arjantiinaan immoo guyyaa Dilbataatti injifannoo waancichaaf wal morkatu. Bara kana keessaa adda ta'ee, gareen injifatu waancicha cinaatti bilillee ykn qubeelaa injifannoo addaa akka argatu ibsameera.

title: Ethiopia’s National Dialogue Could Unravel the Federal Bargain
english: Ethiopia has launched a National Dialogue aimed at addressing long-standing political and social tensions through widespread public consultation. However, many in the Somali Region are concerned that the process might be used to weaken the current federal system and constitutional protections for self-determination. While Somalis feel the current federal model has been poorly implemented, they view the 1995 constitution as a vital safeguard against political marginalization and worry that centralization will undermine their rights.
amharic: ኢትዮጵያ ለረጅም ጊዜ የቆዩ የፖለቲካ እና የማህበራዊ ችግሮችን ለመፍታት ያለመ ብሔራዊ ምክክር በቅርቡ ጀምራለች። ይሁን እንጂ በሶማሌ ክልል የሚገኙ ብዙ ሰዎች ይህ ሂደት አሁን ያለውን የፌዴራል ስርአት እና የራስን በራስ የማስተዳደር ህገ-መንግስታዊ መብቶችን ለማዳከም ሊውል ይችላል የሚል ስጋት አላቸው። የሶማሌ ክልል ነዋሪዎች የአሁኑ የፌዴራል ስርአት በአግባቡ እንዳልተተገበረ ቢያምኑም፣ የ1995ቱን ህገ-መንግስት የፖለቲካ መገለልን ለመከላከል እንደ ዋና መከላከያ ስለሚመለከቱት፣ ስልጣንን ወደ መሃል ማዕከል የማድረግ እንቅስቃሴ መብታቸውን ይነካል ብለው ይፈራሉ።
oromo: Itoophiyaan rakkoolee siyaasaa fi hawaasummaa biyyattii mudatan furuuf marii biyyaalessaa eegaluun ishii ni yaadatama. Haata'u malee, godina Somaalee keessatti namoonni hedduun adeemsi kun sirna federaalizimii amma jiruufi mirgoota ofiin of bulchuu kanneen heera mootummaa bara 1995 keessatti tumaman akka laaffisutti sodaatu. Ummanni godina Somaalee sirni federaalizimii amma jiru akkaataa barbaadameen hojiirra ooluu dhabus, heera mootummaa kana akka gaachana guddaa giddu-galeessummaa siyaasaa irraa isaan eeguutti waan ilaallataniif, qaamni biyya bulchu aangoosaa gara giddu-galeessaatti cimsachuun mirga isaanii akka tuqu yaaddoo qabu.

title: Kolkata sings for Messi as World Cup fever takes hold
english: Hundreds of passionate football fans gathered early in the morning in Kolkata, India, to watch Argentina play in the World Cup on a large outdoor screen. Despite heavy rain, the supporters remained dedicated to cheering on Lionel Messi and his teammates throughout the tense match. The event showcased the city's deep devotion to the Argentine squad, blending traditional fandom with modern social media culture.
amharic: በህንድ ኮልካታ የሚገኙ በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩ የእግር ኳስ አፍቃሪዎች የአርጀንቲናን የዓለም ዋንጫ ጨዋታ በትልቅ ስክሪን ለመመልከት በማለዳ ተሰብስበው ነበር። ምንም እንኳን ከባድ ዝናብ ቢዘንብም፣ ደጋፊዎቹ በጨዋታው ወቅት ለሊዮኔል ሜሲ እና ለቡድን አጋሮቹ ያላቸውን ድጋፍ በታላቅ ጉጉት ገልጸዋል። ይህ ክስተት ከተማዋ ለአርጀንቲና ብሔራዊ ቡድን ያላትን ጥልቅ ፍቅር እና የደጋፊዎችን ስሜት የሚያሳይ ነበር።
oromo: Kutaa Indiyaa Kolkaataatti, gartuun jaallattoota kubbaa miilaa hedduun tapha Waancaa Addunyaa kan Arjantiinaa iskirinii gurguddaa irratti hordofuuf ganama barii walitti qabaman. Roobni cimaan roobuyyuu, deggertoonni kun taphicha guutuu keessa Lioonel Mesii fi taphattoota isaa jajjabeessuudhaan qabaman. Taateen kun jaalala magaalattiin garee Arjantiinaaf qabdu kan agarsiisu yoo ta'u, miira gammachuu fi tokkummaa deggertoota gidduutti mul'ate dha.

title: France vs England: Deschamps set for final World Cup match as Zidane waits
english: Didier Deschamps will coach his final match for France on Saturday during the 2026 World Cup third-place playoff against England. This game marks the end of his successful 14-year tenure, which included leading the team to a 2018 World Cup title. Zinedine Zidane is expected to take over the position following Deschamps' departure.
amharic: ዲዲዬ ዴሻምፕ በ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ የደረጃ ለሦስተኛ ደረጃ ከእንግሊዝ ጋር በሚደረገው ጨዋታ የፈረንሳይ ብሔራዊ ቡድንን ለመጨረሻ ጊዜ ይመራሉ:: ይህ ጨዋታ እ.ኤ.አ በ2018 ዓለም ዋንጫን ማሸነፍን ጨምሮ በቡድኑ ውስጥ ያሳለፉትን የተሳካ የ14 ዓመት ቆይታ ፍጻሜ ያደርገዋል:: ከለቀቁ በኋላም ዝነኛው ተጫዋች ዚነዲን ዚዳን አሰልጣኝ ሆነው እንደሚተኩ ይጠበቃል::
oromo: Didier Deschamps guyyaa Sanbataa tapha sadarkaa sadaffaa qophii waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 keessatti garee Faransaay leenjisuun isaa dhuma ta'a. Taphi kun tajaajila isaa waggaa 14 kan injifannoon guutamee fi waancaa addunyaa bara 2018 fudhachuu dabalatu xumura godha. Deschamps erga gadhiisanii booda, Zinedine Zidane bakka isaanii akka fudhatu eegama.

title: Tuchel: England carry ‘scars’ of World Cup heartbreak into France playoff
english: England manager Thomas Tuchel has acknowledged that his team is struggling with the emotional pain of their World Cup semifinal loss to Argentina. Despite being criticized for his tactical choices, Tuchel accepted full responsibility for the defeat and noted that the squad still needs to improve to compete with elite teams like Argentina, Spain, and France. England will now face France in the third-place playoff match in Miami this Saturday.
amharic: የእንግሊዝ ብሔራዊ ቡድን አሰልጣኝ ቶማስ ቱሄል፣ ቡድኑ በአርጀንቲና ከተሸነፈበት የዓለም ዋንጫ ግማሽ ፍጻሜ ውድድር የተሰማውን ከፍተኛ ሀዘን ገልጸዋል። በጨዋታው ወቅት በወሰዷቸው የታክቲክ ውሳኔዎች ትችት ቢሰነዘርባቸውም፣ ቱሄል ለሽንፈቱ ሙሉ ሃላፊነት እንደሚወስዱ ተናግረዋል። እንግሊዝ ከዓለም ከፍተኛ ደረጃ ካላቸው ቡድኖች ጋር ለመፎካከር ገና ብዙ ሥራ እንደሚቀራት የገለጹ ሲሆን፣ ቡድኑ ቅዳሜ ዕለት ከፈረንሳይ ጋር ለሶስተኛ ደረጃ የመለያ ጨዋታ ይጫወታል።
oromo: Leenjisaan garee biyyaalessaa Ingiliz Tomas Tucheel, gareen isaanii injifatannoo Ardhentinaa dura isaan mudateen gaddi guddaan isaanitti dhaga’amee akka jiru ibsaniiru. Murtiiwwan isaan taphicha keessatti fudhatan irratti qeeqni kan isaan mudate ta’us, injifatannoo kanaaf guutummaatti itti gaafatamummaa kan fudhatan ta’uu himaniiru. Ingiliz garee sadarkaa olaanaa irra jiran wajjin dorgomuuf hojii hedduu akka isaan hafu kan hubachiisan yoo ta’u, Dilbata dhufuuf karoorri ture kun harca’ee, gareen kun Sanbata dhufu sadarkaa sadaffaa qabachuuf Faransaay wajjin taphata.

title: Israel’s ‘Crimson Thread’ military barrier is strangling the West Bank
english: Israel has implemented a new military barrier in the Jordan Valley, effectively isolating Palestinian communities and cutting off access to their farmland. These restrictions, enforced by soldiers and settlers, have led to destroyed infrastructure and water shortages that are forcing local farmers to abandon their crops. Residents are now struggling to reach basic services as the region faces increased movement limitations and displacement threats.
amharic: እስራኤል በዮርዳኖስ ሸለቆ አዲስ ወታደራዊ መከላከያ በመገንባቷ የፍልስጤም ማህበረሰቦችን ከመሬታቸው ተለይተው እንዲቆዩ አድርጋለች። በወታደሮች እና በሰፋሪዎች የሚተገበሩት እነዚህ ክልከላዎች የመሰረተ ልማት ውድመትን እና የውሃ እጥረትን በማስከተላቸው አርሶ አደሮች እርሻቸውን እንዲለቁ እያስገደዳቸው ነው። አካባቢው ለከፍተኛ የመንቀሳቀስ ገደብ እና ለተፈናቃይነት ስጋት በመዳረጉ ነዋሪዎች ለመሰረታዊ አገልግሎቶች ለመድረስ ተቸግረዋል።
oromo: Israa'el gammoojjii Yordaanos keessatti daangaa waraanaa haaraa dhaabuun ishee, hawaasni Palastinaa lafa isaanii irraa akka gargar bahan taasiseera. Duula waraanaa fi qe'ee buqqaastotaan kan raawwatamu kun, manca'iinsa bu'uuraalee misoomaa fi hanqina bishaanii waan hordofsiiseef, qonnaan bultoonni lafa qonnaa isaanii dhiisanii akka bahu dirqisiiseera. Naannichi daangaa sochiin guutamee fi soda buqqaatii keessa waan jiruuf, jiraattonni tajaajila bu'uuraa argachuuf rakkachaa jiru.

title: Canadian wildfire smoke shrouds US, potential risk for World Cup final
english: Smoke from wildfires in Canada is spreading across several regions of the United States, impacting air quality for over 100 million residents. This environmental hazard has raised significant concerns regarding the health and safety of attendees at the upcoming World Cup final. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation as the thick pollution blankets major American cities.
amharic: በካናዳ እየነደደ ያለው የደን ቃጠሎ ያስከተለው ጭስ ወደ አሜሪካ የተለያዩ አካባቢዎች በመዛመት ከ100 ሚሊዮን በላይ ሰዎችን የጤና ደህንነት አደጋ ላይ ጥሏል። ይህ የአየር ብክለት በቅርቡ በሚካሄደው የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ ላይ ሊያሳድር የሚችለው አሉታዊ ተጽእኖ ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ባለስልጣናት በአሜሪካ ዋና ዋና ከተሞች የተጋረጠውን ይህንን የአየር ብክለት ሁኔታ በቅርበት እየተከታተሉት ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Aara ibidda bosonaa Kaanaadaa keessatti ka'e gara magaalaalee Ameerikaa gara garaatti babal'achuun, namoota miliyoona 100 ol ta'an irratti dhiibbaa qilleensa faalamee uumeera. Faalamni qilleensaa kun tapha xumuraa Waancaa Addunyaa dhufuuf jedhu irratti yaaddoo guddaa uumeera. Abbootiin taayitaa magaaloota guguddoo Ameerikaa keessatti aara kana hordofaa jiru.

title: England carry ‘scars’ of World Cup heartbreak into third-place playoff
english: England’s national football team is preparing for a third-place playoff match against France following a disappointing semifinal loss to Argentina. Coach Thomas Tuchel has accepted responsibility for his tactical decisions during the match and acknowledged that his players are struggling to move past the painful defeat. He also noted that the team still needs to improve to reach the level of elite nations like Argentina, Spain, and France.
amharic: የእንግሊዝ ብሄራዊ እግር ኳስ ቡድን በአርጀንቲና ከተሸነፈ በኋላ ለሶስተኛ ደረጃ ለሚደረገው ጨዋታ ከፈረንሳይ ጋር ለመጫወት እየተዘጋጀ ነው። አሰልጣኝ ቶማስ ቱሄል በጨዋታው ወቅት ለወሰዱት የሜዳ ላይ ስልት ሙሉ ሀላፊነት ወስደዋል፤ ቡድኑም ሽንፈቱን ለመርሳት እየተቸገረ መሆኑን ገልጸዋል። አሰልጣኙ እንግሊዝ እንደ አርጀንቲና፣ ስፔን እና ፈረንሳይ ያሉ የአለም አናት ላይ ካሉ ቡድኖች ጋር ለመስተካከል አሁንም መስራት እንዳለባት ተናግረዋል።
oromo: Garee kubbaa miillaa biyyoolessa Ingiliz, injifannoo gar-irraa Arjentiinan isaan mudate booda, tapha sadarkaa sadaffaa fiinaalii kan Faransaay wajjin taasisaniif qophaa'aa jiru. Leenjisaan garee kanaa Tomas Tuuheeliin tarkaanfiiwwan taktikaa inni taphicha irratti fudhateef itti gaafatamummaa kan fudhate yoo ta'u, taphattoonni isaas miira gaddaa kana keessaa ba'uuf rakkachaa akka jiran ibseera. Akkasumas, Ingiliz sadarkaa biyyoota gurguddoo akka Arjentiinaa, Ispeenii fi Faransaay irra gahuuf ammas hojii guddaan akka isaan eeggatu dubbateera.

title: Messi reflects on pressure and competition ahead of World Cup final
english: As the World Cup final approaches, Lionel Messi shared his perspective on handling high-stakes matches. He explained that his lifelong experience in football has helped him focus on enjoying the game instead of worrying about pressure. This positive mindset has remained a fundamental part of his professional journey.
amharic: የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜው ሲቃረብ፣ ሊዮኔል ሜሲ ለከፍተኛ ጫናዎች እንዴት ምላሽ እንደሚሰጥ ሃሳቡን ገልጿል። እግር ኳስን ከልጅነቱ ጀምሮ መጫወቱ በጨዋታው ላይ ከመጨነቅ ይልቅ በሂደቱ እንዲደሰት እንዳስተማረው ተናግሯል። ይህ አዎንታዊ አመለካከት በሙያዊ ህይወቱ ውስጥ ስኬታማ እንዲሆን የረዳው ቁልፍ ምክንያት እንደሆነም ጠቅሷል።
oromo: Qophiin xumura tapha waancaa addunyaa yeroo itti dhihaatutti, Liyoonel Mesii dhiibbaa cimaa mo'achuun akkam akka danda'amu ilaalchisee yaada isaa ibseera. Tapha kubbaa miilaa ijoollummaa irraa jalqabee taphachuun isaa, dhiibbaa isatti dhaga'amuun yaaddawuu mannaa, taphicha gammachuudhaan akka taphatu isa gargaareera. Ilaalchi gaariin kun jireenya isaa keessatti milkaa'ina inni argateef bu'uura guddaa ta'uu isaa dubbateera.

title: A seventh night of US strikes cuts water to villages in Iran’s south
english: For the seventh consecutive night, the United States conducted airstrikes on Iran, specifically targeting critical energy infrastructure and bridges. These attacks disrupted essential water supplies for several communities in the Hormuzgan region. In retaliation, Iran launched counter-attacks against US military facilities located in Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan.
amharic: አሜሪካ ለሰባት ተከታታይ ቀናት በአሜሪካ ላይ ያነጣጠሩ የአየር ጥቃቶችን በኢራን በመፈጸም የመሰረተ ልማት ግንባታዎችን እና ድልድዮችን አውድማለች። የዚህ ጥቃት አካል ሆኖ በሆርሙዝጋን ግዛት የሚገኙ በርካታ ከተሞች የውሃ አገልግሎት አጥተዋል። ኢራንም ለዚህ ምላሽ በኩዌት፣ በባህሬን እና በጆርዳን በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጣቢያዎች ላይ ጥቃት ሰንዝራለች።
oromo: Ameerikaan guyyoota torba walitti aansuudhaan magaalaalee fi bu'uuraalee misoomaa Iraan irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwachaa jirti. Haleellaa kana hordofuudhaan naannoo Hormuzgaaniitti qaxxaamura magaalaalee hedduu keessatti tajaajilli bishaan dhugaatii akka dhaabbatu ta'eera. Iraanis haaloo kana baasuuf jechuudhaan buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa kanneen Kuweyt, Bahreyn fi Jordaan keessa jiran irratti haleellaa deebisteetti.

title: Kuwait Airways says most flights rescheduled as airspace closed
english: Kuwait Airways has adjusted its flight schedule following the closure of the country's airspace on Saturday. This decision comes as the Kuwaiti military manages security responses to ongoing missile and drone attacks from Iran. Travelers are encouraged to monitor their messages and flight details closely for the latest updates regarding their trips.
amharic: ቅዳሜ ዕለት የአገሪቱ የአየር ክልል በመዘጋቱ ምክንያት ኩዌት ኤርዌይስ አብዛኛዎቹን በረራዎች አዘግይቷል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተወሰደው የኩዌት ወታደራዊ ኃይል ከአፍጋኒስታን በሚሰነዘር የሮኬት እና ድሮን ጥቃቶች ዙሪያ እየወሰደ ባለው የደህንነት እርምጃ ምክንያት ነው። ተጓዦች ስለ በረራዎቻቸው ወቅታዊ መረጃ ለማግኘት በስልካቸው የሚላኩላቸውን መልዕክቶች እንዲከታተሉ ተመክረዋል።
oromo: Guyyaa Sanbataatti qilleensaan biyyattii cufamuu isaatiin walqabatee, Kuwait Airways balaliiwwan isaa hedduu jijjiiruu beeksiseera. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame waraanni Kuwaiti weerara rookeettii fi xiyyaara malee (drone) Iran irraa dhufaa jiru ittisuuf hojjachaa waan jiruufidha. Abbootin imalaas waa'ee balalii isaanii odeeffannoo dhihoo argachuuf ergaawwan bilbila isaanii irratti ergaman akka hordofan gorfamaniiru.

title: IRGC warns states hosting US forces of 'corresponding response'
english: The Iranian Revolutionary Guard has threatened nations that provide bases to American troops, warning them of potential retaliation. The group claims these countries are being used as starting points for attacks against Iran and advised them to take protective measures for their citizens. This follows allegations from Tehran that US military strikes recently caused civilian casualties in the Hormuzgan province.
amharic: የኢራን እስላማዊ አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጣቢያዎችን ያስተናገዱ ሀገራት በኢራን ላይ ጥቃት ለመሰንዘር እንደ መነሻ እያገለገሉ ነው በማለት አስጠንቅቋል። እነዚህ ሀገራት ለዜጎቻቸው ደህንነት አስፈላጊውን ጥንቃቄ እንዲያደርጉ የጠየቀው ዘበኛው፣ ተመሳሳይ ምላሽ እንደሚሰጥ አስታውቋል። ይህ ማስጠንቀቂያ የመጣው በሆርሙዝጋን ግዛት በአሜሪካ የአየር ጥቃት የሲቪል ሰዎች መሞታቸውን ተከትሎ ነው።
oromo: Raayyaan Ittisa Bilisummaa Isilaamaa kan Iiraan, biyyoota buufata waraanaa Ameerikaaf kennan irratti tarkaanfiin fudhatamuu akka danda'u akeekkachiiseera. Biyyoonni kun Iiraan irratti miidhaa geessisuuf akka buufataatti tajaajilaa jiru kan jedhe gareen kun, lammiilee isaanii eeguuf qophii ta'uu akka qaban gorseera. Akeekkachiisni kun kan dhufe, lola Ameerikaan naannoo Hormuzgaanitti gaggeessiteen namoonni nagaa ajjeefamuu isaanii hordofee dha.

title: Iran media: Blasts in Khorramabad, US assets in Bahrain struck
english: Escalating regional tensions have led to a series of military strikes involving Iran, the United States, and neighboring nations. Iranian media claims that U.S. forces launched missiles at sites in Khorramabad, Jask, and Bandar Abbas, while Iran reportedly targeted American military assets in Bahrain. Meanwhile, Kuwait's military is actively responding to ongoing missile and drone attacks within its borders.
amharic: በኢራን፣ በአሜሪካ እና በአካባቢው ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ግጭት እየተባባሰ በመምጣቱ ተከታታይ ወታደራዊ ጥቃቶች እየተፈጸሙ ይገኛል። የኢራን መገናኛ ብዙኃን አሜሪካ በኮራምባድ፣ በጃስክ እና በባንዳር አባስ ከተሞች ላይ የሚሳኤል ጥቃት መክፈቷን ሲዘግቡ፣ ኢራንም በበኩሏ በባህሬን የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጣቢያዎችን ማጥቃቷን አስታውቃለች። በሌላ በኩል፣ የኩዌት ጦር በግዛቱ ላይ እየደረሱ ያሉ የሚሳኤል እና የድሮን ጥቃቶችን ለመመከት እርምጃዎችን እየወሰደ ነው።
oromo: Waraana fi wal-dhabiinsa naannicha keessatti ka'een wal-qabatee, Iran fi Amerika gidduutti haleellaan waraanaa gaggeeffamaa jira. Miidiyaaleen Iran akka gabaasanitti, Amerika magaalonni Khorramabad, Jask fi Bandar Abbas haleeluu ishee ibsameera; Iranis gama isheen buufata waraana Amerika kan Bahrain irratti haleellaa raawwachuu ishee beeksiste. Gama biraan, humnoonni waraana Kuwait haleellaa misa'elaa fi dooniin (drone) biyyattii irratti gaggeeffamaa jiru ittisuuf tarkaanfii fudhachaa jiru.

title: Hind Rajab Foundation files complaint in Portugal against Israeli soldier
english: The Hind Rajab Foundation has launched a formal criminal complaint in Portugal against an Israeli soldier named Etamar Ivry, who is visiting Lisbon. The foundation accuses him of involvement in war crimes and genocide due to his role in demolishing civilian buildings in Gaza. They based these allegations on social media videos posted by the soldier himself, which document his actions while serving in the military.
amharic: የሂንድ ራጃብ ፋውንዴሽን በፖርቱጋል በሊዝበን በዕረፍት ላይ የሚገኘውን ኤታማር ኢቭሪ የተባለ የእስራኤል ወታደር ላይ የወንጀል ክስ መሠረተ። ፋውንዴሽኑ ወታደሩ በጋዛ የሲቪል መሠረተ ልማቶችን በማውደም የጦር ወንጀል እና የዘር ማጥፋት ወንጀል ፈጽሟል ብሎ ይከሳል። ክሱም ወታደሩ በራሱ የማህበራዊ ሚዲያ ገጽ ላይ ለቀቃቸው የቪዲዮ ማስረጃዎች ላይ የተመሠረተ ነው።
oromo: Hundeen Hind Rajab jedhamu, waraana Israa'el kan ta'e Etamar Ivry jedhamu irratti, biyya Poorchugaal keessatti himata yakkaa dhiyeesseera. Himannichi waraanni kun yeroo ammaatti magaalaa Lisban keessa boqonnaa irra akka jiru ibsa. Hundichi, waraanni kun Gaaza keessatti qabeenya namoota nagaa diiguun yakka waraanaa fi yakka namoomaa irratti raawwachuu isaa viidiyoowwan inni ofii isaa miidiyaa hawaasaa irratti gadhiise ragaa godhachuun himata.

title: Tehran warns of ‘full-scale offensive’ if US strikes continue
english: A top Iranian military adviser has threatened a major, unrestrained offensive if US airstrikes against the country persist. Iran declared that it will no longer prioritize deterrence or limited retaliation, signaling a move away from previous efforts to contain the conflict. Furthermore, officials stated that the period for diplomatic negotiations during these hostilities has officially come to an end.
amharic: የኢራን ከፍተኛ ወታደራዊ አማካሪ አሜሪካ በሀገሪቱ ላይ የምታደርገውን የአየር ጥቃት ከቀጠለች፣ ኢራን ሁሉን አቀፍ ጥቃት እንደምትከፍት አስጠንቅቀዋል። ኢራን ከአሁን በኋላ በተወሰነ የበቀል እርምጃ እንደማትገደብ እና ግጭቱን የመቆጣጠር ፍላጎቷ እንዳበቃ ገልጸዋል። እንዲሁም በጦርነት ጊዜ የሚደረጉ የድርድር ጥረቶች ሁሉ ተጠናቀዋል ሲሉ አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Gorsaan waraanaa olaanaan Iraan, yoo Ameerikaan haleellaa qilleensa irraa itti fufte, Iraan tarkaanfii guutuu ta'e kan fudhattu ta'uu akeekkachiisaniiru. Iraan kanaan booda haleellaa daangeeffame irratti qofa akka hin hundoofneefi fedhiin walitti bu'iinsa hir'isuu akka hin jirre ibsaniiru. Kana malees, yeroon marii fi diippilomasii walitti bu'iinsa kana keessatti xumuramuusaa beeksisaniiru.

title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
english: The United States has conducted military strikes against Iranian targets for seven straight nights following the collapse of a temporary ceasefire.
